name: Mark Kelly
subject: You, me and Tom

body:
We know Arizona is going to be one of the closest battleground states in the nation. That’s why we’re joining with Congressman Tom O’Halleran | | | It’s Mark Kelly -- candidate for U.S. Senate in Arizona. [**Today I’m asking you to make a split donation between my campaign and Congressman Tom O’Halleran who is running in one of our state’s most competitive House name: Wesley Hunt for Congress
subject: Hunt for Congress Weekly Update
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hunt for Congress
body:
Friend,

This year marks 19 years since the 9/11 attacks; we should each pause to remember this solemn date, the thousands who lost their lives, and the responsibility we owe to our fellow Americans to honor their legacy. Last year, I wrote an op-ed about my experience on 9/11 and our duty to protect and preserve the unique freedoms we hold dear. You can find the article [here](http://links.wesleyfortexas.com/u/click?_t=fd5d6e7aa0334e7ebb096a39dc496016&_m=d6e3dc3430b9452eaf88531605ca1df3&_e=J8GdUGE-j5cbHRRMX7WvAVbO4SVdmoM13mSNdnF7Xz0XL2rfscgIK3l_7t49wPfdFcl5trgOkgZS2psuTfuySlGvvQp8SBB9YL8GCFNjoQmJ6oycIXf7r3O5c5ak-6R-RSUKRuOeAe0vh9jF-0ZZZrGNLZaIWwqIByK-R2x6QVaewdlNeoxhKwi1hd8Sixm3DLgdWh72Lye6fXWxsWjm2pGCriJhRyP-KXZNnRhs79-WplCnzP6mKZPsOZCHJQT62hETCOahbSL4BnJWSdaWkHMem9QNNctPE3CMgR38u31tPw4VJprULLXsCpAD9ZFuJ1O_6rLuCjCTPwGa7QZucHXIXq2t2spphH8IMT9G5DrAOWDhrIiNSqIGa_KD62sB).

Team Hunt has had a full week this week. From front-yard meet and greets and high profile endorsements to enthusiastic Team Hunt block-walks, the energy and excitement surrounding our campaign is incredible. Each day brings us one step closer to November and, with the progress we have made to-date, I am confident in our path to victory.

On Tuesday, I was honored to receive the endorsement of former Congressman of the 7th District, Bill Archer. I am humbled by Congressman Archer's endorsement and hope to live up to his legacy of service and leadership. Thank you for your support, Congressman. You can read his full statement [here](http://links.wesleyfortexas.com/u/click?_t=fd5d6e7aa0334e7ebb096a39dc496016&_m=d6e3dc3430b9452eaf88531605ca1df3&_e=J8GdUGE-j5cbHRRMX7WvAfgcxe5hJRXxtcrxzivN2mqjpnSiIqXJPBG65CXQ6vhrwXXkWUH6jPRlIuh8t1Ez0meJ7qlBBvnHgEl7oKIE2nzLCEyqaavqUOxml7CZR733RVN_kko-zzi5-3pEx_stU-FwaTl-jTub30ojitlQB7dTPFsMggy-Zd5WykgtLSiD-tOKFPibsvd0rKlHIXgGepUKGrIHM62klLFrWe-dnSdDvf5rkRb852kHKHwPyoDgiuYE2h_pDpe-zDuaH9OfDLwejATo--ZwqlNMAUkSmrrHwN6l1UL23z1mqCv5NasfcpEaQC4JbrluSPS_-q8Z6A%3D%3D).
On Wednesday, I launched my second TV advertisement of the general election: Daddy Duty. As husband to a nurse practitioner and father to a young daughter, and another one on the way, I intimately understand the importance of accessing affordable, quality healthcare. As your next member of Congress, I will work across the aisle and with professionals here in Houston to improve our healthcare system and build pathways to high quality, affordable care for every American. While my opponent supports dramatically increasing the role of government-run healthcare, inviting a [litany of consequences for American families](http://links.wesleyfortexas.com/u/click?_t=fd5d6e7aa0334e7ebb096a39dc496016&_m=d6e3dc3430b9452eaf88531605ca1df3&_e=J8GdUGE-j5cbHRRMX7WvAfgcxe5hJRXxtcrxzivN2mrNjThXVaq-vYxnKbsny0-pTn1aWXfilcaFUhYK-0NS6b-yhzNNO0WnzFTK_Xc2JNjhQ7XYUQrztLOQmHdw6rpmJhvhfrFk8N2buBDAG2tjgYNRBdm6u-hpXfKr5T7OtzEiAH6_5QQ2Gng6WAgraLNcUum0nV_uWud2RJf-STFT5l9iw6c_17pRrIZVOhKo-x-ezgJnltlSSYKtwaRRYKNlbL97w2vKefjuMxEtYit7lH2AEm7reuql04kzSgUI2WUpyFQiu7wr7gKgOwu8BEE56OvJIYAaPWmZLY3srnrl2g%3D%3D), I believe we must work to increase competition in the insurance market, reduce the cost of prescription drugs, and categorically protect coverage for individuals with pre-existing conditions.

[](http://links.wesleyfortexas.com/u/click?_t=fd5d6e7aa0334e7ebb096a39dc496016&_m=d6e3dc3430b9452eaf88531605ca1df3&_e=J8GdUGE-j5cbHRRMX7WvAWw8mp-G44IN59D-4wAtB2GMJQwJAGvkT-UYEF7QdOunrtL6a3lC9I5h_JkdnGfgOOcZzFCs2feUm5wbUHr4Y5hYENF4VXFnP6SiD8iavOwXRymLi_W4ATbQ5yraBX5Zox4r1JFb_kHUFJXpZsZnLogIOS94kcxXEMnBbTaU_ENBmsrim_IxXK-TrvTV3CASJ9utGdba7mO5JFMRbeZzKJqv3r5nEbNrv0qKWSAE1RQ6FY7qmghFn3Dcs1p0mDXlykCU5KCPa0BPsapZzOqr3a7QJmnixy7NAn97UHBZpQy2)

On Thursday, I was proud to join Governor Greg Abbott's pledge to Back the Blue. Our police officers put their lives on the line to serve and protect our communities. Without hesitation, these men and women will put themselves between your family and any individual seeking to do them harm. In order to increase trust and stability within our communities, we must give our officers the resources and support they need to effectively perform their duties. I believe we can both engage in meaningful police reform and give our officers the support they deserve. I was disappointed that my opponent, Lizzie Fletcher, once again [failed to stand against the dangerous movement](http://links.wesleyfortexas.com/u/click?_t=fd5d6e7aa0334e7ebb096a39dc496016&_m=d6e3dc3430b9452eaf88531605ca1df3&_e=J8GdUGE-j5cbHRRMX7WvAWw8mp-G44IN59D-4wAtB2GMJQwJAGvkT-UYEF7QdOuneok-ZGIzbly-_LQ4RFwXYGdhMNNhwBuv76QPNa5BbDZjWyiqjcQj7pX_kk78WndcdJS5CE2J8nvFZYDhyhTu7eqWnii_vznrPDsEd4dr6ZJkJcgWkVemwGw7IEjZWKtvmU9uxRfSsLG5ns8mg2OL_s8E2w402e5Yrlrm62wRHsVVELX2DrbNWaXTxpQ_YGvKlu9MHS35_heisouEwOz_NCTmdd10cYgChEzqRd1JUTi2ui9facH4BbSpsivdI6Is) within her party to defund the very individuals who have volunteered to keep us safe.

On Friday, I was honored to receive Dr. Conde's endorsement of my campaign in the 7th District. Medical professionals should have a seat at the table when legislators attempt to re-work our healthcare system. I am honored to have Dr. Conde's support and look forward to working alongside Dr. Conde and members of the Team Hunt Medical Professionals Advisory Board to forge healthcare solutions that support doctors and the patients they serve.

We are just over 50 days away from Election Day, and I can already see the positive impact our campaign is having in the 7th District. Our achievements would not be possible without the hard work and dedication of supporters like you. Together, we can bring constructive change to this district and flip this seat in November.

Thank you,
Wesley

****[CONTRIBUTE](http://links.wesleyfortexas.com/u/click?_t=fd5d6e7aa0334e7ebb096a39dc496016&_m=d6e3dc3430b9452eaf88531605ca1df3&_e=J8GdUGE-j5cbHRRMX7WvAbxvEJEil4cBt3wnt79HrBeznYGsLqr-kxXhgI-XNQBd_wmYbge5OCGnL9vuL8NZcG1W35C--P8u8Cy2dNJvH1qyAHz07rivEkSkWA9NqcIKXcBYKRuw_l9khzZYw79pLV6IYKgjtIlsgZhsWXB2j0sCQoaTp5n_HudibpulbPJJCfF1g8inzI1ZfNSqX13dg-vNaGSjlorJwY7ZYo1aDj_olbYq0lpaeoRSD4sMmVBNpxPQoBYb2w-Bmt9_69RUIp9fPQdhB3zY7KXGQQz6fks%3D)****

Our achievements would not be possible without the hard work and dedication of supporters like you. Together, we can bring constructive change to this district and flip this seat in November. Thank you, Wesley **** Paid for by Hunt for Congress. Military images and information do not imply endorsement by DOD [Department of Defense] or any service branch.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Moms=20in=20Office?=
subject: Climate Fires
body:
This is not the new normal. This is the beginning of something much worse to come if we don't act now. | | | |
---
| | |
---
| Friends,

If you don't believe in climate change, come to California. As of Thursday, 5 of the 10 largest fires in the history of California are burning. What we are seeing now is **just the beginning of the climate change** scientist have been warning us about.

Inaction from our government is not acceptable. Our politicians have ignored the threat of climate change for far too long putting the interest of fossil fuel companies before the **future of our children**.

**Here are the facts:**

3 million acres burned in California alone
California summers are 2.5 degrees warmer than in the 1970s
163 million trees lost in California over the past decade
2.7 trillion fossil fuel exploitation financed by big banks since 2016
$1,000 moved out of big banks equals driving 6,000 miles less in climate impact

**This is not the new normal. It is the beginning of something much worse to come if we don't act now.**

While some of our politicians are still debating the validity of our climate crisis, we can all act now and change our daily actions. Move your money out of big banks that deny climate change and use your deposits to finance fossil fuel projects.

Our friends at [Aspiration Bank](https://momsinoffice.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fb9d4118fda0058c977d045ec&id=257ff7296e&e=3f151f8b74) extended a generous offer to our supporters.

Aspiration offers socially-conscious and sustainable banking services and investment products, so you can make money while making the world a better place. And, unlike the Big Banks, they don’t use your deposits to fund oil pipelines or turn your fees into campaign contributions to the politicians that work against you.

[Sign up here](https://momsinoffice.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fb9d4118fda0058c977d045ec&id=1c9474d430&e=3f151f8b74) to get $50 when you open an account and Moms in Office founder Simona Grace* will add an additional $50.

[*Terms Apply](https://momsinoffice.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fb9d4118fda0058c977d045ec&id=6d85d30274&e=3f151f8b74)

Thanks for all that you do! We appreciate your support!

Moms in Office
---
| [Sign Up Here ](https://momsinoffice.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fb9d4118fda0058c977d045ec&id=146bd3c017&e=3f151f8b74 "Sign Up Here ")
---
|
---
|
---
# This former D.C. insider is building a bank for ‘forgotten Americans’
["We decided ](https://momsinoffice.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fb9d4118fda0058c977d045ec&id=68404593ed&e=3f151f8b74)it was the right time because a big part of why we as a country are in the midst of this crisis is because we didn't act boldly enough and quickly enough when we could have to respond to COVID," he said. "We're long past the point of responding quickly [to climate change], but we still have time to respond boldly, and in a big way and for each individual to step up."

"Banks, beset with myriad balance sheet issues following the financial crash, were slow to innovate elsewhere."

[Fortune ](https://momsinoffice.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fb9d4118fda0058c977d045ec&id=b23860191f&e=3f151f8b74)

ONLY 50 PATRIOTS CAN GET ON THE PRESIDENTIAL DONOR LIST TO HIT TODAY’S GOAL. Will you make the list?

Friend,

name: Team Finello
subject: Christina Finello Weekend of Action w/Special Guest
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Finello for Congress
body:
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP07/1/76523/images/FinelloForCongress_PrimaryLogo%20%281%29.png]
Hi Peter, Join Christina Finello and our incredible volunteer team for our last Weekend of Action before ballots drop, this weekend on Saturday 9/19 & Sunday 9/20 [https://www.mobilize.us/finelloforcongress/event/320507/] ! There are only 50 days left until the Election, less than two months. There is no time left to wait to get involved, we need to take action now to flip PA-01 Blue. On Sunday at 2pm we will be joined by a Broadway cast member of the hit musical Hamilton, Ryan Vasquez - you are not going to want to miss this! Ryan will be performing before we make calls into the community! https://www.mobilize.us/finelloforcongress/event/320507/ [https://www.mobilize.us/finelloforcongress/event/320507/] Join Christina and Team Finello, Get Involved, And Speak To Community Members About Why We Need To Flip PA-01 Blue! [https://www.mobilize.us/finelloforcongress/event/320507/] There are multiple shift times over the entire weekend, so there is a time that works with everybody's schedule. Team Finello will provide comprehensive trainings before each of the shifts to ensure that everybody who joins us is comfortable, excited, and more than ready to speak with community members in PA-01. https://www.mobilize.us/finelloforcongress/event/320507/ [https://www.mobilize.us/finelloforcongress/event/320507/]We are also inviting all volunteers and interested community members to join our team for our first Finello's Front Line Strategy Meeting [https://www.mobilize.us/finelloforcongress/event/321403/] on Thursday 9/17 at 6pm. Take a behind the scenes look at our campaign, ask questions, and meet other passionate volunteers!
With your help, we will elect Christina as the first woman to represent PA-01 in Congress & flip PA-01 Blue!
Best, Team Finello
CONTRIBUTE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/christina-finello-web-signup?refcode=volunteer]
Paid for by Finello for Congress
Finello for Congress
P.O. Box 2772
Warminster, PA 18974
United States
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/ed585c1e-f7f5-ea11-99c3-00155d039e74/0238d41c-88f6-ea11-99c3-00155d039e74?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjUyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMjM4ZDQxYy04OGY2LWVhMTEtOTljMy0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lJhHXMjXk8uRjwrJ_MTMGKysG9C1gLB7ciBVRO521ZI=&id=114259036 .

name: Team Nehls
subject: Nehls News: Weekly Update from the Campaign!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nehls for Congress
body:
Tap or click to read more >>
**Nehls News
A Weekly Campaign Update
** _**Kevin McCarthy is coming to Richmond for a rally!**_ BIG NEWS! Republican Leader Kevin McCarthy is joining Sheriff Troy Nehls for a rally on Friday, September 18th from 5:15 PM – 5:45 PM at Freedom Hall in Richmond! You won't want to miss this. [**Reserve your spot and get started here**.](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5154cae44487eae0041ad8cde91a9694/35193/a6e315192acc7808/d9f9487c5c960182c3d6b838967d376c/35193) [ ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5154cae44487eae0041ad8cde91a9694/35193/a6e315192acc7808/dfbedd7d81dee7f6c3d6b838967d376c/35193) _**Instagram Updates**_
With help from some of our interns we are updating our Instagram page and planning to post more often with pictures form the campaign. We got several great ideas form our interns on how to more effectively target younger voters who may use Instagram as a main news source.
To follow us search for @SheriffTNehls or go to **[https://www.instagram.com/sherifftnehls/](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5154cae44487eae0041ad8cde91a9694/35193/a6e315192acc7808/dfaf408079665ffbc3d6b838967d376c/35193)** _**Block Walking Across The District**_
We had over thirty volunteers knock doors for our campaign this weekend! We knocked over 5,000 doors and had great conversations with voters while wearing masks and maintaining social distancing. If you’re interested in block walking, we need more volunteers! Visit **[nehlsforcongress.com/volunteer](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5154cae44487eae0041ad8cde91a9694/35193/a6e315192acc7808/8f6fdf3ef77decbac3d6b838967d376c/35193) **to get involved. _**Intern profile - Allyson Karaffa**_ Hey y’all! I’m Keely Meloche, and I’m an Intern Supervisor for the campaign. I grew up in Katy and am currently pursuing a Master’s degree in Mechanical Engineering. I recently became an American citizen, and when I found out that Troy Nehls’ campaign had an intern program, I couldn’t wait to apply! I’m so passionate about Sheriff Nehls’ campaign and being involved has been an incredibly rewarding and enjoyable experience. Working for Nehls for Congress has provided me with the opportunity to develop and refine a wide assortment of skills in a new and exciting environment. The campaign has been a terrific way for me to gain insight into the electoral process and make lasting friendships. From making phone calls to knocking on people’s doors, working for Nehls for Congress gives me a sense of pride and representation as an American voter. I absolutely love working for this campaign, and I can’t wait to vote for Sheriff Troy Nehls for Congress.
I wouldn’t be a part of this campaign if I didn’t believe that Sheriff Nehls was the right candidate for Fort Bend County. This has been a great experience so far and I am excited for all our hard work to pay off in November. | | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5154cae44487eae0041ad8cde91a9694/35193/a6e315192acc7808/964c3803872cd747c3d6b838967d376c/35193) | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5154cae44487eae0041ad8cde91a9694/35193/a6e315192acc7808/41b2fd111c9de7bbc3d6b838967d376c/35193)
---|---
Paid for by Nehls for Congress

This email was sent by: Troy Nehls
1612 CRABB RIVER RD, RICHMOND, TX, 77469
[Profile Center](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/procenter/procenter.cfm?action=profile&eid=5154cae44487eae0041ad8cde91a9694&c=35193&jid=a6e315192acc7808)
[Unsubscribe](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/unsubscribe1.cfm?eid=5154cae44487eae0041ad8cde91a9694&c=35193&jid=a6e315192acc7808)
[View as webpage](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/vm2/a6e315192acc7808/35193/5154cae44487eae0041ad8cde91a9694/35193)

body:
Friend,

Since Margaret’s message yesterday, our grassroots team has really stepped up. We are now just $10,735 away from hitting our mid-month fundraising goal, ensuring that we are on track to raising $50,000 by the end of the month!

We recently launched our first television ad, and we are already running digital ads and sending out mail to get our message to voters before Vote by Mail ballots arrive. But, if we are going to be able to have the resources we need to get out our message and win this election, it’s critical that we reach this fundraising goal.

**[Can you contribute whatever you can afford right now to help us reach this critical goal, and keep up our campaign’s momentum? Click here to make a donation right now.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/19147388/251140223/1073285021?refcode2=efe8bcda-99f6-ea11-99c3-00155d039e74&emci=6defd17a-99f6-ea11-99c3-00155d039e74&emdi=efe8bcda-99f6-ea11-99c3-00155d039e74&refcode=091420-es-mm-fr-series-5-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODIwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZmU4YmNkYS05OWY2LWVhMTEtOTljMy0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=goe-4XfKabvbaKjMquTGnc6m4Iv3d5UIrdfM42h0vsw=)**

From: **Margaret Good**

Subject: keeping my word

Friend,

While my opponent will say anything to get elected, you can trust me to keep my word. From protecting Social Security and Medicare to protecting our land and water — I’ll always stand up for you and our shared future.

**But in order to represent you in Congress, I need your help right now.**

We’ve launched our first television ad, digital ads are running across the district, and we are sending out mail to voters before their ballots arrive — but in order to continue reaching out to the voters we need to flip this seat from red to blue, we must have the necessary resources to continue funding our outreach efforts.

**That’s where you come in, friend.**

**[We’ve set a goal to raise $25,000 before Tuesday so we can stay on track before our last FEC end-of-quarter deadline before the election and we still have $12,750 to go. Can you contribute any amount you can afford right now to help us reach our critical fundraising goal?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/19147390/251140225/1073285021?refcode2=efe8bcda-99f6-ea11-99c3-00155d039e74&emci=6defd17a-99f6-ea11-99c3-00155d039e74&emdi=efe8bcda-99f6-ea11-99c3-00155d039e74&refcode=091420-es-mm-fr-series-5-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODIwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZmU4YmNkYS05OWY2LWVhMTEtOTljMy0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=goe-4XfKabvbaKjMquTGnc6m4Iv3d5UIrdfM42h0vsw=)**

Margaret Good for Congress

Margaret Good is a lawyer, runner, and state representative running in FL-16 to change the face of Southwest Florida, and we are so proud to have you on our team. Margaret is a strong voice for our values—she brings an incredible work ethic and common sense to her fight for working families, to protect Florida’s fragile environment, for accessible and affordable healthcare, and against the special interests that have hijacked our political process. We need to send her to Congress to continue fighting for us.

But I still need your immediate help - Shaheen has a massive war chest and is positioned to overwhelm my campaign on the airwaves over the next two weeks.

clean_body: | = | | Beto O’Rourke is on Team Siegel and we’re using his playbook to WIN! = In 2018, Beto won TX-10. He did it by sticking to his gut — not listening to his pollsters. We’re planning to do it again by talking to every TX-10 voter and counting NO ONE out. It’s why when Michael McCaul blasts Mike with made up versions of who he is — we’re standing up to tell voters who and what Mike is fighting for. We’re not letting national media or national Republicans get the best of us — we’re talking to Texas families about issues that truly matter. But we need your help. We’re falling behind on our $30,000 Mid-Month goal to keep our ad up around the district.= | | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = Truth is, McCaul has left TX-10 behind and his constituents need to know that. So we’re organizing like never before, online and on the phones to take our message to the voters. Our game plan to flip TX-10 includes keeping Mike on TV as much as possible, but we can’t do it without you.= = | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = We’re taking this fight to TX-10 TV screens, Team Siegel | | If you'd like to support Mike Siegel for Congress, you can = We believe that emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters like you. | | Friend, Did you know that today marks only 50 days until the election? It's coming up fast and it will be here before we know it. This year has been extremely challenging: the pandemic stole the lives of 200,000 Americans, the murder of George Floyd shed light on the systemic racism that's been here all along, and now Donald Trump is recklessly lying about the severity of the pandemic to bolster his own campaign. If you're tired of all the chaos and division, help us fight back. Will you invest $50 for the 50 days until the election. If you have not donated yet this year, **Minnesota residents can receive a full refund once per year ($50 for an individual or $100 for a couple) from the state.** Would you help us build our momentum today? [**$50 for 50 days**](https://act.myngp.com/el/DIVCdLY-hT1JFQoq2OLq0xSl1WDbKCHmPDVXCWqv0rY=/WdYbX2vKH7BZoKTpZa623fF-RIwtYn_Du1c2mongOwM=?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=091320) The stakes are high. If you've been looking for a way to help, **this is it.** With Trump determined to win Minnesota, the next 50 days here will determine the outcome of our nation for generations to come - and we need to do everything we can to win. body:
We're halfway! |
---
Friend, THANK YOU!

I wrote to you a couple of days ago to set the goal of raising $100,000 by the middle of the month.

Thanks to YOU, **_we are over halfway there!_**

**Today we're exactly 50 DAYS OUT from Election Day.** It's vital that we meet *every single one* of these fundraising goals.

**_Especially since November 3 is really just the LAST day of voting -- the Election is already here!_**

If we fall short of our goals by even a little, we may have to pull back on our advertising and organizing efforts.

_We can't afford to let that happen, friend!_

**[But I know this grassroots team will rise to the challenge. So please, chip in any amount right now to help us stay on track to hit $100,000 in grassroots support by tomorrow night. We're over halfway there!](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e2908/5b2c1286/3967d553/25f377ce/2697349069/VEsH/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_09_14_mm_am?refcode=em_2020_09_14_mm_am")**

name: Max Rose
subject: introducing myself
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Max Rose For Congress
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/pTUPjs1zgS3VVLS8zL6EaNQjBmzTHL5iCKIcNVjvZVk=/J91PCvTpekFu4CZBhDz5IFsZWJOop-QBex1MisnAYuw=?refcode=em_intro_2020.09.14_b1_mr_conole&amount=25)
---
| Friend --

I wanted to take a moment to introduce myself, and to say thanks for joining our team to keep this competitive district out of corporate interests' hands.

**I 'm Max Rose, and I represent hardworking people of South Brooklyn and Staten Island in Congress.**

But my commitment to service started long before I ever ran for Congress in 2018.

I'm the first post-9/11 combat veteran to represent New York City. Like so many of my fellow vets, I served in uniform because I believe in America and everything it stands for. But, we're being challenged like never before.

Despite the gridlock and dysfunction in Washington, I wouldn't be running for re-election if I didn't believe that I could make a positive difference in people's lives. I know that when leaders in Washington get it right, lives are changed for the better. I know this because the actions of Congress saved my life.

When my unit's vehicle hit an improvised explosive device in Afghanistan, I lived because of the innovative armor under the vehicle. A few years prior, those vehicles were nicknamed kevlar coffins. But Congress came together, in a bipartisan manner, to allocate the funds necessary to create new armor to save soldiers' lives, because it was the right thing to do.

We can bring that same approach to fix our tunnels, trains, and bridges or to combat the opioid crisis -- we just need representatives in Washington with the courage to lead. **That 's why I'm so grateful to have you on my team, friend.**

My work is just beginning, but we've already got another tough election ahead of us. Protecting our victory in 2020 is going to require all hands on deck.

Follow our campaign on Facebook or Twitter and help us share our campaign messages! | [LIKE ON FACEBOOK »](https://act.myngp.com/el/pTUPjs1zgS3VVLS8zL6EaNQjBmzTHL5iCKIcNVjvZVk=/VUzy5YholabjXy50Nwy_xJ7uFQyNfv7vLhZggLkQ7ao=)
---

Thanks for joining us,

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/pTUPjs1zgS3VVLS8zL6EaNQjBmzTHL5iCKIcNVjvZVk=/J91PCvTpekFu4CZBhDz5IFsZWJOop-QBex1MisnAYuw=?refcode=em_intro_2020.09.14_b1_mr_conole&amount=25)

_Max_

[**P.S. If you 're ready to help us win, you can click here to make a contribution to my campaign. I'm not taking one cent from corporate PACs or federal lobbyists, so I'm counting on people like you to step up and help us fund this campaign the right way. >>**](https://act.myngp.com/el/pTUPjs1zgS3VVLS8zL6EaNQjBmzTHL5iCKIcNVjvZVk=/J91PCvTpekFu4CZBhDz5IFsZWJOop-QBex1MisnAYuw=?refcode=em_intro_2020.09.14_b1_mr_conole&amount=25)

name: Sandy Smith
subject: 758,057 reasons
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SANDY SMITH FOR CONGRESS INC
body:
| | | [ ](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=i5J88pSc53Nxmng&b=4c9D954tW_9NcZZrwTMMxg)
---

Dear Peter,

**I am Sandy Smith, the Republican nominee for Congress in North Carolina’s newly redrawn 1st Congressional district. I am in a tight race in a CLOSE swing district- and that's why I'm writing urgently to ask for your help. **

You've heard President Trump warn of the dangers of massive mail-in balloting. And he's absolutely right.
Think of it this way: _would YOU put $500 cash in an envelope and mail it to yourself? If not, why would you trust the Postal Service to deliver your ballot, your voice?_
President Trump's words on this topic are prescient:
_"So now the Democrats are using Mail Drop Boxes, which are a voter security disaster. Among other things, they make it possible for a person to vote multiple times. Also, who controls them, are they placed in Republican or Democrat areas? They are not Covid sanitized. A big fraud!"_
So we don't trust the Democrat mail in vote schemes. But many people have requested ballots- and we must fight for their votes!
_**In my district alone, 758,057 voters have requested mail in ballots (supposedly). That's a lot of voters who will be receiving their ballots next week- so they need to hear from me, RIGHT NOW!**_

[ ](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=i5J88pSc53Nxmng&b=u6YDvLzLFUV4DSMGWdOGVA)
---

**_In Georgia, over 1,000 voters voted BOTH by mail AND in person!_**

_As many as 1,000 Georgians may have cast ballots in the June primary both by mail and in person, Republican Secretary of State Brad Raffensperger said Tuesday, raising questions about how well poll workers in the state are enforcing safeguards._

_Raffensperger’s office is investigating whether those who voted twice did so intentionally and whether two votes were actually counted in each case. Georgia’s June 9 primary was plagued by widespread problems with the delivery of mail ballots and long lines at the polls._

_Raffensperger’s office acknowledged that many voters may have shown up in person because they were afraid that their mail ballots would not be counted._

_WE NEED URGENTLY TO ADVERTISE TO THESE VOTERS NEXT WEEK, AND TO MAKE SURE THAT PEOPLE DO NOT VOTE TWICE!_

[Can you help?](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=i5J88pSc53Nxmng&b=4c9D954tW_9NcZZrwTMMxg)

I need you to help me beat this vicious leftist machine here in North Carolina. I stand with our President. Our people need to know who to vote for and how to do it- and for that I need your help!

**Pelosi's Democrats are trying to steal this thing. I'm facing her Deputy Whip- and they won't give up easy. I've fought him tooth and nail to this point, and I can pull this off, but only with your help!**

[If you agree with me, I need your help to beat Pelosi's deputy whip Butterfield!](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=i5J88pSc53Nxmng&b=4c9D954tW_9NcZZrwTMMxg) Unlike Pelosi and Butterfield, I want an accurate vote- no double voting allowed! This is a crazy year, but let's make sure the right people win!

[Can you help me take this swing district back](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=i5J88pSc53Nxmng&b=4c9D954tW_9NcZZrwTMMxg), with your best and immediate contribution of $15, $35, or $250? Taking out my opponent, one of Pelosi’s leading lieutenants, would be a crippling blow to the Democrat Socialists and to Nancy Pelosi’s agenda.

G.K. Butterfield;s record is awful, but to replace him I [really need you today](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=i5J88pSc53Nxmng&b=4c9D954tW_9NcZZrwTMMxg)! Let's stand up to these hypocrites now, before it's too late!

For God and Country,
[ ](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=i5J88pSc53Nxmng&b=4c9D954tW_9NcZZrwTMMxg)
---
Sandy Smith
Republican for Congress, North Carolina's new First District
Conservative
Entrepreneur & Military mom
[ ](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=i5J88pSc53Nxmng&b=4c9D954tW_9NcZZrwTMMxg)
---
P.S. [Will you contribute $15, $60, $250, or your largest contribution?](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=i5J88pSc53Nxmng&b=4c9D954tW_9NcZZrwTMMxg) I need to reach my goal to catch up with Butterfield.

PAID FOR BY SANDY SMITH FOR CONGRESS INC

P.O. Box 434
Winterville NC 28590
USA

[Unsubscribe](https://www.aweber.com/z/r/?rMyMrEwcrLQcbIyMTGxMzLRGtCzsrIysrMzM) | [Change Subscriber Options](https://www.aweber.com/z/r/?rMyMrEwcrLQcbIyMTGxMzLRGtCzsrIysrMzM)

name: =?utf-8?Q?Dani=20Brzozowski?=
subject: Help me cut through the noise & nonsense around voting
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dani for Illinois
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/fb092d5e2a31/help-me-cut-through-the-noise-nonsense-around-voting?e=140a9b81e7)
---
| |
---
| |
#
There has been a lot of confusion surrounding voting lately. The fact that it can vary state-by-state sure doesn’t make it any simpler, either. The other side has been pushing conspiracies that fraud is rampant with vote-by-mail, but that is simply not true. My opponent has even said that “vote-by-mail” is risky, while “absentee voting” is perfectly fine,**even though they are the same thing.** The hypocrisy is awful as well. President Trump, despite being vehemently against vote-by-mail, has requested a mail-in ballot. My opponent, who is also anti-mail-in ballot, said that he might vote absentee. Voting-by-mail is good enough for them but not for the rest of us. **We must defeat this hypocrisy in November.** [Click here to chip in and help us unseat an anti-VBM Congressman because democracy works when everyone can vote. ](https://daniforillinois.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=16d8d19eb3a417b5b09061c0d&id=eac8bcabc0&e=140a9b81e7) My opponent doesn’t support election infrastructure, going so far as voting against emergency funding for the Postal Service. When a constituent asked about ensuring that their ballot is delivered, his office blew it off as a state issue, despite the Postal Service being a federal program. And now, he is going out and spreading misinformation about vote-by-mail. The reason for it all? He knows that when more people vote, Democrats win. And he sees us coming, which is why he is doing everything he can do to stop us. He sees our massive field operation and growing online presence, and he is scared. That is why he is actually campaigning for the first time in a decade. He recognizes that we have the potential to defeat him. All because I have people like you investing in my campaign. [I hope I can count on you to help us build off of this momentum and cross the finish line.](https://daniforillinois.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=16d8d19eb3a417b5b09061c0d&id=3d7159f604&e=140a9b81e7) Dani Brzozowski
Democratic Nominee for Congress, IL-16
---

name: Bill Olson
subject: I will protect and take care of veterans
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY WILLIAM OLSON FOR CONGRESS
body:
Bill Olson for Congress

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=hSWH_AXDCF6OuRU&b=yzyDii.B_sVbAiifFrESZw

Hi Peter,

My name is Bill Olson, and I am a conservative Christian combat vet who just overwhelmingly won my primary, by 20 points! I spent 27 years in the U.S, Army, with my sons also serving in the armed forces! I will not let the media's concocted lies about President Trump run over the truth about his support for our military!

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=hSWH_AXDCF6OuRU&b=yzyDii.B_sVbAiifFrESZw

The most consistent supporters of the President has been soldiers and vets like me- and it's easy to understand why.

President Trump has been very good to us!

The President has given our men and women in uniform raises every year he has been in office. He has also donated his salary, several times, to military and veteran causes.

There is no one who follows politics who seriously thinks the President holds veterans and our military in anything but the highest regard! After all... he hasn't started any new wars, first President in a long while to say that!

To make matters worse, the far-Left and their media allies lied boldfaced in saying a wounded Marine called Trump a liar when he had NOT:

The original story published by the Atlantic cited four anonymous sources claiming to have firsthand knowledge of the discussion in which Trump made the controversial comments. Since then, a number of people who placed themselves in the room during the reported conversation, including former U.S. National Security Adviser John Bolton, who has a rocky past with Trump, have stepped forward to deny that the president ever made those disparaging remarks. Henline said he believes the story to be false.

“I really believe the president didn't say this," Henline said. "There’s been anonymous sources and other sources in the room that aren’t necessarily friends with the president or believe in his ways, but they're still not gonna slam him and make up this rumor and keep it spreading. And so with that said, I don't think he really said this."

Although many doubt the veracity of the story, Henline believes it was successful in its intent to turn veterans against the president.

“Them taking that well-recognized photo and using it for their agenda and changing veterans' minds, thinking the president talks to them like that is ridiculous," Henline said.

Here's the doctored meme that Henline says is NOT true:

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=hSWH_AXDCF6OuRU&b=yzyDii.B_sVbAiifFrESZw

Thank you for standing up for the truth, Mr. Henline!

Of course President Trump believes him to be a hero- he invited him to the White House and decorated him for his valor and service in the military!

Trump visits Walter Reed Hospital every week to check up on wounded soldiers- and importantly, he doesn't create more of them by getting us into more wars!

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=hSWH_AXDCF6OuRU&b=yzyDii.B_sVbAiifFrESZw

It is abundantly clear- the Fake News Media is an appendage of the extreme Left and actively hates us. You shouldn't be able to lie about anyone and hide behind made-up "anonymous" sources. This is what Americans hate about the media!

Here's the good news: The American people see this. They are rallying behind our American President- and that includes military and veterans like me!

That's why we MUST win this year!

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=hSWH_AXDCF6OuRU&b=yzyDii.B_sVbAiifFrESZw

I won't be afraid to fight. I'll fight the media and I'll fight for our veterans, like President Trump has.

Nancy Pelosi called us Republicans "enemies of the state". The media openly mocks us and thinks we have to swallow it! We have to fight if we don't want to be treated like this!

I have taken an oath to the Constitution- one that has no expiration date! I am a veteran and a patriot and I need your help to counter the media's lies!

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=hSWH_AXDCF6OuRU&b=yzyDii.B_sVbAiifFrESZw

Help me replace Socialist Darren Soto, so we can toss these people from office! I am now the official Republican nominee, and I need your help to win in November!

If I win, Nancy Pelosi will almost certainly not be speaker. Help me now!

I need your help to stand up FOR the Constitution and AGAINST the media!

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=hSWH_AXDCF6OuRU&b=yzyDii.B_sVbAiifFrESZw

Can you help me?

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=hSWH_AXDCF6OuRU&b=yzyDii.B_sVbAiifFrESZw
This is a swing suburban district and we can take it back! Can I count on you for a donation

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=hSWH_AXDCF6OuRU&b=yzyDii.B_sVbAiifFrESZw
today? Time is running out- that's why I need your help today!

I'm going to make sure the radical Democrats like Biden and Soto lose BIG this year - with your help!

Let's get this done!

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=hSWH_AXDCF6OuRU&b=yzyDii.B_sVbAiifFrESZw

Bill Olson

Combat Veteran of Multiple Wars

Supports President Trump

Not a Career Politician

Hard Core Conservative Fighter

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=hSWH_AXDCF6OuRU&b=yzyDii.B_sVbAiifFrESZw

P.S. I really need your help today

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=hSWH_AXDCF6OuRU&b=yzyDii.B_sVbAiifFrESZw
, so a conservative combat vet can retake this swing district that the Republicans held just earlier this decade. I can do this - WITH YOUR HELP!

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=hSWH_AXDCF6OuRU&b=yzyDii.B_sVbAiifFrESZw
Thank you and God bless America! - Bill.

Born and raised on a small farm in Nambe, New Mexico, by a union ironworker and a public school employee, Ben Ray is running for Senate to build a better future for all families.

Ben Ray knows that our communities are stronger when everyone has a fair shot. He's dedicated his career to creating good-paying jobs for hardworking New Mexicans, expanding health care, and protecting our natural resources.

As Assistant Speaker in the U.S. House of Representatives, Ben Ray has worked to pass a people-first agenda that helps all Americans -- from lowering prescription drug prices to preventing gun violence, protecting our immigrant communities, improving equity in our criminal justice system, and removing the dark influence of money in politics. He is proud to be endorsed by Planned Parenthood Action Fund, NARAL Pro-Choice America, AFSCME, American Nurses Association, League of Conservation Voters, Brady Campaign to End Gun Violence, Giffords, Human Rights Campaign, Latino Victory Fund, Congressional Black Caucus PAC, Council for a Livable World, and End Citizens United.

**Ben Ray doesn 't take a dollar from corporate PACs. name: Team MJ
subject: What flipping the Senate means, and the candidates who can do it
disclaimer_text: Paid for by MJ for Texas
body:
We promise it'll be worth the effort, Peter.

|
---
[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891f7b/7f51f7bc/455704b4/4efa2f9c/2102685996/VEsH/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/logo?refcode=emaillogo&amount=5")

| | Flipping the Senate isn't going to be easy, Peter. Taking on an 18-year incumbent senator won't be easy, either. Most things worth doing aren't easy. But here's the thing -- **this is all worth it.**

If we don't win in November and flip the Senate, we're going to have more years of Mitch McConnell stopping every meaningful piece of legislation in its tracks. **[The work we're doing now is going to make sure that doesn't happen.](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891f7b/7f51f7bc/455704b4/4efa2f93/2102685996/VEsE/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://emilyslist.org/bundle/blue-senate-in-2020?source=hegar")**

**If we don 't flip the Senate:**
* We won't see lower prices on prescription medicine for families struggling to get by.
* We won't be able to expand and improve health care coverage, and maintain protections for people with preexisting conditions.
* We won't be able to protect our communities with universal background checks and other common sense gun safety reforms.
* We won't be able to defend our public lands from reckless consumption.

We NEED to flip the Senate in 2020, and here's the good news: By donating today, you can help not just MJ, but candidates across the country who can flip the Senate. **[Your donation today fuels MJ here in Texas, Dr. Barbara Bollier in Kansas, Sara Gideon in Maine, Theresa Greenfield in Iowa, and Paulette Jordan in Idaho.](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891f7b/7f51f7bc/455704b4/4efa2f93/2102685996/VEsF/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://emilyslist.org/bundle/blue-senate-in-2020?source=hegar")**

Each of these candidates are running grassroots-powered campaigns that rely on donors just like you to win in November. **Can we count on you?** | [DONATE NOW](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891f7b/7f51f7bc/455704b4/4efa2f93/2102685996/VEsC/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://emilyslist.org/bundle/blue-senate-in-2020?source=hegar")
---
Don't wait until it's too late -- chip in now to help us flip the Senate this year.
\-- Team MJ

[DONATE](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891f7b/7f51f7bc/455704b4/4efa2f93/2102685996/VEsD/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://emilyslist.org/bundle/blue-senate-in-2020?source=hegar")
---
** **

|
---

| It's clear we need a real leader for Texas and a Senate that prioritizes our health care. **[More than ever, we're relying on online fundraising to keep building the campaign we need to win in November, and we greatly appreciate your continued support>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891f7b/7f51f7bc/455704b4/4efa2f92/2102685996/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjIxMTIifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-covidfooter?refcode=2112&amount=10")**

However, we know this is not an easy time for many. If you'd like to pause receiving fundraising emails for the next few weeks, **[please let us know here](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891f7b/7f51f7bc/455704b4/4efa2f91/2102685996/VEsB/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/s/mj-covid-fewer-emails")**. We'll still keep in touch with important information and to ask your thoughts from time to time.
---

name: Mary Mancini
subject: Senator Warren has made some huge endorsements in TN
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE TENNESSEE DEMOCRATIC PARTY, DR
body:
https://secure.ngpvan.com/tJLKn-4F5Ee9e7tBzzVl5A2 [https://secure.ngpvan.com/tJLKn-4F5Ee9e7tBzzVl5A2]
Peter,
Senator Elizabeth Warren has endorsed a few key Tennessee candidates, and we couldn’t be more thrilled. Gabby Salinas (HD-97), Brandon Thomas (HD-49), and Gloria Johnson (HD-13) are all critical wins this November and we are so grateful to have Senator Warren’s commitment of support. That being said, we need to increase fundraising numbers if we are going to give these candidates the support they need. We’re 50 days away from the election – this can’t wait.
That’s why I’m asking you to make a donation today – we need to raise another $6,705 by tomorrow at midnight to meet our midmonth goal. Our Get Out The Vote push depends on your support, and in November we’re going to need every single vote we can get. Will you back up Senator Warren’s endorsement and donate right now? [http://secure.ngpvan.com/tJLKn-4F5Ee9e7tBzzVl5A2]

Tennessee has an amazing slate of diverse and qualified candidates, but they need your support if they are going to win this November. So please, consider making a donation right now, together we’ve got this!

Pat answered questions from constituents in a radio segment on WCOE FM | | | | [ ](https://foundationbluemedia.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c156e612ce88db66e08a28197&id=a6be53ef6f&e=5886ca081d)

---
| Dear Friend,

I had the pleasure of joining Nate Loucks on WCOE FM's radio program _Sound Off_ in LaPorte on Friday.

In addition to sharing my memory of the 9/11 attacks, I had the privilege of answering questions from listeners on issues such as healthcare, education, social security, bipartisanship, and my commitment to always make myself available to the people of this district.

I welcome you to listen to [the segment](https://foundationbluemedia.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c156e612ce88db66e08a28197&id=627c248ad0&e=5886ca081d) and hear our conversation.

Be well,

Pat

**That’s right, in less than two months you’ll get to cast a ballot for Governor Holcomb and make your voice heard as part of the team that’s building One Indiana for All. **

We won’t mince words.

It’s an important election and it’s crucial to continue supporting Governor Holcomb if we want to get Indiana back to not just setting records -- but breaking them.

**Setting more economic records, delivering more results for Hoosier students, continuing to build upon the best infrastructure in the whole country — that all must continue past November 3rd. **

That’s why we’re reaching out today.

Holcomb Crew

name: Jay Inslee
subject: Republicans have more cash on hand now than in 2016
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JAY INSLEE FOR WASHINGTON (D)
body:
We don't have much time left.
| [](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/8912?t=3&akid=8146%2E868730%2EvHX7x0) Friend, Washingtonians begin voting in just one month -- and I'm feeling a bit of déjà vu. It feels eerily like back in 2016 when we felt so sure of Democratic victories only to be completely blindsided in November. Republicans have more money on hand than they did then and their sights set on more upsets than in 2016. The Republican Governors Association has raised more than $200 million since 2018 preparing for this moment. They're ready to use it to unseat the three Democratic governors they're targeting this year. I am one of those targets, and ever since the pandemic started, Donald Trump has had his sights set on Washington state. **[We don't have many of these deadlines left -- so each and every one really, really matters. In order to reach voters before voting begins, we need to raise $25,000 by midnight on Wednesday. Will you donate $5 or more right now so we can reach voters before Washingtonians prepare to vote?](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/11121?t=4&akid=8146%2E868730%2EvHX7x0)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [$5 →](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/11122?t=5&akid=8146%2E868730%2EvHX7x0)
---
| | [$10 →](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/11123?t=6&akid=8146%2E868730%2EvHX7x0)
---
| [$25 →](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/11124?t=7&akid=8146%2E868730%2EvHX7x0)
---
| | [$50 →](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/11125?t=8&akid=8146%2E868730%2EvHX7x0)
---
| [$100 →](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/11126?t=9&akid=8146%2E868730%2EvHX7x0)
---
| | [OTHER →](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/11121?t=10&akid=8146%2E868730%2EvHX7x0)
---
2016 taught us you can never be too prepared -- because you never know what's coming. No matter what happens in the next two months, I know I can count on you.
Very truly yours,
Jay

body:
President Trump signed an executive order Sunday to lower the cost of prescription drugs. “My Most Favored Nation order will ensure that our Country.. | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=38de2ed83a&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| | |
# **Trump Signs Executive Order to Lower Drug Prices in Fight Against Big Pharma**

“President Trump signed an executive order Sunday to lower the cost of prescription drugs,” Peter Aitken reports for Fox News.

“My Most Favored Nation order will ensure that our Country gets the same low price Big Pharma gives to other countries. The days of global freeriding at America’s expense are over,” President Trump wrote on Twitter.

[Click here to read more.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=6f09e8c865&e=3ee4985eea)

Read more in the [_Washington Examiner_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=46f2a910f5&e=3ee4985eea).

It's hard to believe our campaign started almost a year ago and the election is only 50 days away, but now more than ever we need your help.

Nancy Pelosi is spending millions propping up my opponent in an attempt to buy a seat in Iowa. Coastal liberals are doing everything they can but we can stop them.

Hi friend. It's Jake Best, Jon Ossoff's Press Secretary.

I'm always keeping an eye out for important updates in the news about our race, and while I don't usually read Fox News, this caught my eye: [](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e290d/5b2c1286/39695747/25f37649/880181337/VEsH/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_09_14_fx_nws?refcode=em_2020_09_14_fx_nws_img") _Even Fox News recognizes the momentum of this campaign!!!_

**[Can you chip in $15 right now to keep this momentum going?](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e290d/5b2c1286/39695747/25f37648/880181337/VEsE/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_09_14_fx_nws?refcode=em_2020_09_14_fx_nws&amount=15")**

**Make no mistake, friend -- Republicans are floundering, and _everybody,_including FOX NEWS,_ knows it._**

And this means they're going to dig deep to try to save their Senate Majority and stop Jon's momentum.

We need to capitalize on this moment as best we can, and we need your help. We set a goal of reaching $100,000 by the end of TOMORROW, and we still have a little ways to go.

**[Can you donate any amount today to help us reach our goal so we can kick David Perdue out of office and take back the Senate?](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e290d/5b2c1286/39695747/25f3764b/880181337/VEsC/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_09_14_fx_nws?refcode=em_2020_09_14_fx_nws")**

name: Jenny Beth Martin, Tea Party Patriots Citizens Fund
subject: Get Out The Vote, Pledge to vote in person, & more. Week of Sept. 14th Action Items
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEA PARTY PATRIOTS CITIZENS FUND
body:
| |
---
For this week’s call to action, it’s time to ramp up Get Out The Vote activities; sign up to become a poll worker; take the In-Person Voting Pledge; keep the pressure on the CDC to change their quarantine guidelines; and a new Civics Lesson!

_Note: in order to share the links below, simply open the link, and copy the URL address, and then paste it wherever it is that you are sharing it._
|
---
IT’S TIME TO GET OUT THE VOTE!
Tea Party Patriots Citizens Fund volunteers and donors have worked hard to make our _**2020 Patriot Project**_ a fantastic success so far. We are sending hundreds of thousands of postcards to “first time in forever” Trump voters in Michigan, Pennsylvania, and Wisconsin. The postcard portion of the 2020 Patriot Project is winding down, and **we now need volunteers to send text messages; phone bank; and download, print, sign, and mail letters to voters in critical swing states.**

It is CRUCIAL that we get as many Trump voters out to vote as possible, to overcome the fraud and intent to steal the election that the left is broadcasting as clearly as they can.

Please sign up today to volunteer for our Get Out The Vote activities, and get your friends to sign up too!
[SIGN UP TO VOLUNTEER](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMjU4LTdmODk2NmRiYTU4ZTQwOTBiOTFjZmY2N2YwNmI4NGQ1%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMA%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly9mb3Jtcy5nbGUvZ1lhdGE2eDJLNktGSkx0SEE_bWlkPTQyNjY1JmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUQ&K=0G2SSJTpLJpeHmuQAiy02Q)
|
---
Sign Up to be a Poll Worker
America is in dire need of poll workers for the election. For instance, in just one county in one state, it was just announced last week that they need 400 poll workers. Now multiply this across the country and you can see that we have a huge problem looming. Furthermore, if there are not enough poll workers, it is more likely that people will use mail-in ballots, which increases chances of fraud.

We created a very short how-to guide to help you figure out the process of signing up. Please look through the guide, sign up locally to be poll worker, and then get all of your friends to do the same!
[DOWNLOAD HOW-TO GUIDE](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMjU4LTdmODk2NmRiYTU4ZTQwOTBiOTFjZmY2N2YwNmI4NGQ1%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMQ%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly90cHAtcmVzb3VyY2VzLnMzLmFtYXpvbmF3cy5jb20vZG9jdW1lbnRzL1BvbGxXb3JrZXJfSG93X1RvX0d1aWRlLnBkZj9taWQ9NDI2NjUmaWQ9VDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR&K=cPisL1HXPooHRB8jv7dUSw)
|
---
Pledge to Vote in Person
Speaking of election fraud... the left is waging an all-out information war, trying to convince people and elected officials that only mail-in ballots should be used this year. They understand that the more mail-in ballots that are used, the easier it is for them to steal the election. Whether that means they get more fraudulent ballots turned in to be counted at election time, or that they “find” more ballots for weeks afterward, this much is clear: mail-in ballot fraud could very likely allow the left to steal this election, or create so much chaos that they are able to use that chaos to execute a “hard” coup.

We need everyone that is able to pledge to vote in person this November, if possible.

NOTE: If you are high-risk and need to stay away from public places for your health, or you live in a state where there is no in-person voting at all (like Washington state), this does not apply to you.

If you can, take the Pledge to Vote in Person, and then make sure you get as many other Trump voters as you can to sign the pledge as well. The greater the number of Trump voters that vote in person, the harder it will be for the left to steal the election.
[PLEDGE TO VOTE IN PERSON](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMjU4LTdmODk2NmRiYTU4ZTQwOTBiOTFjZmY2N2YwNmI4NGQ1%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMg%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly92b3RlaW5wZXJzb24uYWN0LnRlYXBhcnR5cGF0cmlvdHMub3JnLz9taWQ9NDI2NjUmaWQ9VDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR&K=MBWx2Yz8fEqVQ8f9YCZNnA)
|
---
Help Reopen Schools and the Country
If you weren’t able to do the action items last week, or you weren’t able to finish, please look through the daily action items from last week, and take at least one action to change the CDC quarantine guidelines. Make sure to also [sign](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMjU4LTdmODk2NmRiYTU4ZTQwOTBiOTFjZmY2N2YwNmI4NGQ1%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMw%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly9mb3Jtcy5nbGUvZXpZTlNDWFpnRmFLb0FSeTg_bWlkPTQyNjY1JmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUQ&K=MbHUl69yGvWGxY9kHqZbyw) and [share](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMjU4LTdmODk2NmRiYTU4ZTQwOTBiOTFjZmY2N2YwNmI4NGQ1%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3ANA%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly90cHAtcmVzb3VyY2VzLnMzLmFtYXpvbmF3cy5jb20vZG9jdW1lbnRzL0xldHRlci10by1XaGl0ZS1Ib3VzZS1EQy1RdWFyYW50aW5pbmctR3VpZGVsaW5lcy5kb2N4P21pZD00MjY2NSZpZD1UMThvOUxuZXVqSGhrOTFRUVE&K=tmS2LSLblwCKo2_YNa5pRA) our letter about changing the CDC’s crazy guidelines if you haven’t already.
[VIEW ACTION ITEMS](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMjU4LTdmODk2NmRiYTU4ZTQwOTBiOTFjZmY2N2YwNmI4NGQ1%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3ANQ%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudGVhcGFydHlwYXRyaW90cy5vcmcvY2FsbHMtdG8tYWN0aW9uL3Jlb3Blbi1zY2hvb2xzLWNvdW50cnkvP21pZD00MjY2NSZpZD1UMThvOUxuZXVqSGhrOTFRUVE&K=tGSaY-pfPzux749rGbSwyg)
|
---
Make Real Civics Education a Priority Again
Week of September 14th
Keep an eye out every week for a new activity or book or lesson to bring real civics back to our children.

This week, we are studying the famous quote from Founding Father John Adams, “Our Constitution was made only for a moral and religious People. It is wholly inadequate to the government of any other.”

First, read the following, together, as a family.
[Read the full letter written by John Adams that contains this famous quote.](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMjU4LTdmODk2NmRiYTU4ZTQwOTBiOTFjZmY2N2YwNmI4NGQ1%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3ANg%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly9mb3VuZGVycy5hcmNoaXZlcy5nb3YvZG9jdW1lbnRzL0FkYW1zLzk5LTAyLTAyLTMxMDI_bWlkPTQyNjY1JmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUQ&K=7_s7cpGx-Pdw8aYtcmIQJg)

[Read “Faith and reason are mutually reinforcing,”](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMjU4LTdmODk2NmRiYTU4ZTQwOTBiOTFjZmY2N2YwNmI4NGQ1%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3ANw%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly9pbXByaW1pcy5oaWxsc2RhbGUuZWR1L3dwLWNvbnRlbnQvdXBsb2Fkcy8yMDE5LzEyL0ltcHJpbWlzX05vdl84cGdOTXNwcmVhZC5wZGY_bWlkPTQyNjY1JmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUQ&K=DatvNXg8DDc7RzsO1rRUdQ) a speech given by Justice Clarence Thomas at the Hillsdale College dedication of their new Christ Chapel in 2019. The entire speech is worthwhile. Note these passages in particular, but do read the entire speech. It’s not long, and it is excellent.
_“The construction of so grand a chapel in 2019 does not happen by accident or as an afterthought. Christ Chapel reflects the College’s conviction that a vibrant intellectual environment and a strong democratic society are fostered, not hindered, by a recognition of the Divine.”_

_“Our country was founded on the view that a correct understanding of the nature of God and the human person is critical to preserving the liberty that we so enjoy.”_

_“John Adams wrote, “Our Constitution was made only for a moral and religious People. It is wholly inadequate to the government of any other.” He recognized that the preservation of liberty is not guaranteed. Without the guardrails supplied by religious conviction, popular sovereignty can devolve into mob rule, unmoored from any conception of objective truth.”_
**Discussion Questions**
1. Discuss what John Adams meant when he stated that “Our Constitution was made only for a moral and religious People. It is wholly inadequate to the government of any other.”
2. How do Justice Thomas’ comments elaborate on the John Adams’ quote?
3. How is this concept relevant in today’s world?

|
---
Thank you!

In liberty,

Jenny Beth

clean_body: | | For this week’s call to action, it’s time to ramp up Get Out The Vote activities; sign up to become a poll worker; take the In-Person Voting Pledge; keep the pressure on the CDC to change their quarantine guidelines; and a new Civics Lesson! Note: in order to share the links below, simply open the link, and copy the URL address, and then paste it wherever it is that you are sharing it. | IT’S TIME TO GET OUT THE VOTE! Tea Party Patriots Citizens Fund volunteers and donors have worked hard to make our 2020 Patriot Project a fantastic success so far. We are sending hundreds of thousands of postcards to “first time in forever” Trump voters in Michigan, Pennsylvania, and Wisconsin. The postcard portion of the 2020 Patriot Project is winding down, and we now need volunteers to send text messages; phone bank; and download, print, sign, and mail letters to voters in critical swing states. It is CRUCIAL that we get as many Trump voters out to vote as possible, to overcome the fraud and intent to steal the election that the left is broadcasting as clearly as they can. Please sign up today to volunteer for our Get Out The Vote activities, and get your friends to sign up too! | Sign Up to be a Poll Worker America is in dire need of poll workers for the election. For instance, in just one county in one state, it was just announced last week that they need 400 poll workers. Now multiply this across the country and you can see that we have a huge problem looming. Furthermore, if there are not enough poll workers, it is more likely that people will use mail-in ballots, which increases chances of fraud. We created a very short how-to guide to help you figure out the process of signing up. Please look through the guide, sign up locally to be poll worker, and then get all of your friends to do the same! | Pledge to Vote in Person Speaking of election fraud... the left is waging an all-out information war, trying to convince people and elected officials that only mail-in ballots should be used this year. They understand that the more mail-in ballots that are used, the easier it is for them to steal the election. Whether that means they get more fraudulent ballots turned in to be counted at election time, or that they “find” more ballots for weeks afterward, this much is clear: mail-in ballot fraud could very likely allow the left to steal this election, or create so much chaos that they are able to use that chaos to execute a “hard” coup. We need everyone that is able to pledge to vote in person this November, if possible. NOTE: If you are high-risk and need to stay away from public places for your health, or you live in a state where there is no in-person voting at all (like Washington state), this does not apply to you. If you can, take the Pledge to Vote in Person, and then make sure you get as many other Trump voters as you can to sign the pledge as well. The greater the number of Trump voters that vote in person, the harder it will be for the left to steal the election. | Help Reopen Schools and the Country If you weren’t able to do the action items last week, or you weren’t able to finish, please look through the daily action items from last week, and take at least one action to change the CDC quarantine guidelines. Make sure to also and our letter about changing the CDC’s crazy guidelines if you haven’t already. | Make Real Civics Education a Priority Again Week of September 14th Keep an eye out every week for a new activity or book or lesson to bring real civics back to our children. It is wholly inadequate to the government of any other.” He recognized that the preservation of liberty is not guaranteed. Without the guardrails supplied by religious conviction, popular sovereignty can devolve into mob rule, unmoored from any conception of objective truth.” Discussion Questions 1. Discuss what John Adams meant when he stated that “Our Constitution was made only for a moral and religious People. It is wholly inadequate to the government of any other.” 2. body:
We need you here in this fight.

| | [ ](https://electdanabarrett.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=602de950cf46fed73b950456c&id=dbbee3d052&e=e25784ff28)

| | **Pledge to Vote on November 3rd ** | **[TAKE THE PLEDGE](https://electdanabarrett.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=602de950cf46fed73b950456c&id=3e1a50d983&e=e25784ff28)**
---

This election might be one of the most important elections in our history. It’s going to determine not only who is in the White House, but how we respond to COVID, reinvigorate our economy, and deal with the warming of our planet.

We’ve been watching in horror as the west coast burns with fires extending from Washington State to California. Thousands have lost their homes and their communities.

These “once in a lifetime fires” are becoming a regular occurrence. Why? Because our government officials don’t believe in science.

[**Stand with us team , and pledge that on November 3rd you will cast your ballot for new leaders.**](https://electdanabarrett.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=602de950cf46fed73b950456c&id=e01c637b4b&e=e25784ff28)
**[TAKE THE PLEDGE](https://electdanabarrett.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=602de950cf46fed73b950456c&id=74ed61898b&e=e25784ff28)**
---

**Barry Loudermilk wants to dismantle the EPA and let our environment be destroyed. Even worse: Loudermilk doesn’t believe in climate change at all. How are we going to move the country forward if our leaders don’t think we have a problem?**

We need to make sure that everyone eligible to vote casts a ballot on November 3rd. This country needs leaders willing to fight for future generations.

[**Sign on and pledge that you’ll vote on November 3rd (or earlier) → **](https://electdanabarrett.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=602de950cf46fed73b950456c&id=19ccbacf1d&e=e25784ff28)
**[TAKE THE PLEDGE](https://electdanabarrett.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=602de950cf46fed73b950456c&id=9d02a2ef85&e=e25784ff28)**

\-- Barrett HQ

Friend,

Election Day is just 50 days away.

No matter what happens, history will be made on November 3rd, and Nancy Pelosi is working harder than ever to make sure that the history books are written in her favor.

_With time rapidly running out, I need your help to**[stop that from happening.](http://links.lahoodforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d5887efe66684ada97976ef2e9d70137&_m=9bee7d50faab4294ab9821d83df97e1a&_e=wflmOae1jyaNseLLW6B6kTCagq93ae7qV1jWQe6Dlk8Y1kvIqa4aTmK0ZxwWP-jqaem0K3Uis0i3YlgmkkFb1mJ72M7ZerDkwzGMaUtKJRCLVG0jpj-oBP5fnVTt49oTU4JnRAhyR5r5ca9b2N1qNEwL__CkI0kmLB0IQD1dFMRiCaOJdzzcWfFw2Z9CYcaiETSSz8XfnJQ6wXudWMLTpT75TsgdTbpEvu1cDPfIzanjF5H-FLQiRMhJicxZi3Tpq2G6WmMseEIxvglrbn0evUZMFSC1-vXp1ckIV1iqIyQsXFzjKMqnA6CKZ19Zn2ybMTvxwcxNRs18Ac1lt17z0sXD6MOCrl69iXktPVshAwL1vLw-uwEtwRpa4ebnnEVuXE1zjFxMEshkGDBcf5fFX6sf2KWqUYyseb_SSD88PmtbCc0mGHcWqoeyzn6zMhcwAU7zPGLg5VFRDnuDBobFRAFK0WUnkupWl2HM2hR5qkU%3D)**_

The Chinese Communist Party is getting bolder, our economy still climbing back to full speed, and police officers are under attack every day. Americans need _**bold leaders**_ in Congress moving forward to tackle these problems head-on – and that’s exactly what Pelosi has refused to do.

_**She’s refused to treat the CCP as a serious threat.**_

_**She’s blocked COVID economic stimulus bills again and again over petty politics.**_

_**She’s bowed down to the mobs calling to defund the police.**_

She’s never been more out of touch with the needs of everyday, middle-class Americans – and we only have 50 days left to take the House out of her hands.

name: Matt Gaetz
subject: Dems ahead with just 50 days left
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF MATT GAETZ
body:
---
| | | | | | [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001FbcC5HSKLNfBjyjdxtcldGKkifLwDg2XD3BJ4jhay8R3QQHmzXDryp8jE_kYcBPQEnMrHFeGchuhS-khs48_6hb2sr0PrpQ_dczNDc5t33TSRY4MXspBAyDC8bWbCYpS11Dfhw9C621avbhUF-dJ6Q-_e5Dh2qxe0-tu7aDlZD4=&c=NAkZ4_hJ4psN7-0qUM9xSBGVZuSvwgLVpl7yFwURfvqK7N-9Wepd_Q==&ch=r0D6m_TmFudevKHtTBqd81gHJxkU4S-UnanE9J9lBuzdZIiif9Qlvg==)
---
| Patriots,
I need to make this email quick, as we are in a tough battle with the Democrats. They have been heavily fundraising the past few months despite a sorry view of America - one that demonizes our Founding Fathers, our Constitution, our police officers, and our freedom.
Democrats have bowed down to the violent BLM mobs that have taken over American cities. They have knelt down for our National Anthem. They have encouraged illegal immigration and laws that release violent criminals back out on the streets.
With just 50 days left until the election, we need to keep up with their fundraising. body:
Election Day on November 3rd is closing in fast; we only have 50 DAYS left before the election! It’s no secret that Nancy Pelosi... | |

[ ](http://links.garbarinoforny.com/u/click?_t=7b77702d6650435d80b420c1495e37a8&_m=66fbaa15156d4a3bbb21c7f076cefcb1&_e=S9oJdaVdRreI8oLs7Spd29bY5JYLWU8KYPuLcEzjEMtO1pEwAvOMlz1X7e84lEHanmvU10lhD-ulqd4iRlfGsdTO6VBmR-EvqYNAugbjKOrSNF1yzDqPCO6GjQZemdcfW6Q3629qv7NUlOPe-dSHAwIr-J3R1TWG7_KnmID_EN31ukQJDugQQ1RXdRua7h9KXA1CEiSKXYlZhwNG-8nyY2kGxVmhggcABpAQRCjXedXvyT1AOkuTvdG3V3u0ugc3NRp0L_ki3dUnBCyhk4jX79UDSy87avZjtWXf2lXI6IGhDyqSgoxGGl0Qfz8TRunE0tzvNaAo4BoOHwh3JSz-ygDdXvt2omuC7EmvkDwLXkv5Z1ePR61tQw5DtgbodbOfCSrFnZB9nL2I90dG7MLCOsdiNgg6SFkXvGFtw_AikDUxeHcssG7PHMGUcSZNq5ix)
Peter,

Election Day on November 3rd is closing in fast; we only have _**50 DAYS left**_ before the election! It’s no secret that Nancy Pelosi and the Democrat Party are funneling millions to Jackie Gordon to flip this seat blue _**PERMANENTLY.**_ But I’m not going to let that happen, and here’s why.

__**➡ I will never stop fighting for our home and the people of Long Island! ⬅**__

clean_body: From Day 1, I told you that my opponent Susan Wild – with her George Soros funding and backing from Nancy Pelosi – would come out of the gate STRONG w Peter, From Day 1, I told you that my opponent Susan Wild – with her George Soros funding and backing from Nancy Pelosi – would come out of the gate STRONG with her television ads. If you haven’t already seen them flood your airwaves, I’m sure you will in the days to come. But Peter, we all know the lies that she is spewing are entirely false. She claims she’s an advocate for small business, but we all know . In fact House Democrats allowed expanded unemployment benefits to expire weeks ago, and instead of fixing the issue Lehigh Valley businesses struggle and wait even longer for much needed relief. Point blank, Susan Wild is DANGEROUS for small businesses Peter, her voting record speaks for itself: Wild votes with Nancy Pelosi 99% of the time. And Nancy Pelosi sides with Joe Biden in wanting to mandate a middle-class tax hike! We need to ensure that we drown out my opponents television ads as soon as possible with our ads that share our commonsense, business forward message. No matter what you are able to chip in, anything helps. I know that I am sick of the lies that have come out of my opponent’s mouth for the last two years, and I can probably presume you feel the same... Will you join me right now in ensuring she doesn’t see the halls of Congress for an ADDITIONAL two years? I hope to hear from you soon, Peter... Time is ticking on, and there's not much of it left. Lisa Scheller Paid for by Scheller for Congress, Inc.

name: Tom Cotton
subject: Petition: Stand up to China and Biden
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cotton for Senate
body:
Joe Biden and the Washington establishment colluded to aid the rise of China, and now you are paying for it. Joe Biden is proud of the fact he gave China the permanent special trade status of "Most Favored Nation" decades ago. His decision supercharged the loss of American jobs.
[](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDM0NTI3ODYS1&kn=4&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTg0MTIwMDIzNAS2&mt=1&rt=0)

Peter,

**Joe Biden and the Washington establishment colluded to aid the rise of China, and now you are paying for it.**

Joe Biden is proud of the fact he gave China the permanent special trade status of _**" Most Favored Nation"**_ decades ago. His decision supercharged the loss of American jobs.

[](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDM0NTI3ODYS1&kn=16&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTg0MTIwMDIzNAS2&mt=1&rt=0)

That's why I'm introducing a bill this week that would repeal the _**Most Favored Nation**_ status for China. Congress and the President need to negotiate our trade status with China each year so they don't take advantage of us again.

**Peter, will you help me fight back?**

[**< <Sign the Petition: END Most Favored Nation Status for China>>**](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDM0NTI3ODYS1&kn=8&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTg0MTIwMDIzNAS2&mt=1&rt=0)
[ ](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDM0NTI3ODYS1&kn=2&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTg0MTIwMDIzNAS2&mt=1&rt=0)****
Joe Biden will continue to send our jobs and money to China without a second thought. He 's enriching the Chinese Communist Party as their military gains a foothold in the Pacific.

**Giving China a special trade status each year while they become a superpower is not a good idea: it 's a _failure of leadership_.**

Peter, we cannot leave our trade status with China on autopilot. I'm counting on your help to fight back against the status quo.

[**< <Sign the Petition: END Most Favored Nation Status for China>>**](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDM0NTI3ODYS1&kn=9&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTg0MTIwMDIzNAS2&mt=1&rt=0)

In Service,
[](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDM0NTI3ODYS1&kn=6&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTg0MTIwMDIzNAS2&mt=1&rt=0)
Tom Cotton
[](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDM0NTI3ODYS1&kn=14&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTg0MTIwMDIzNAS2&mt=1&rt=0)

body:

Election Day is just 50 DAYS AWAY, Peter! The polls are tightening, MJ is closing in on Sen. Cornyn, the Koch network and the NRA are spending big on ads, and we're working around the clock to keep up our momentum.

We set a goal of raising **$50,000** before midnight tonight, and to help us get there, we have a one-day match going. Every donation made today will have twice the impact that it normally would. **[Can we count on you to help us reach our goal and keep this campaign running strong?](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891f45/7f51f7bc/456dd01d/4efa133b/578572391/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjIxMDIifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-finalcountdown?refcode=email_20200914.2nd__2102__&amount=10")**
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

With just 50 days left, now is the time we each have to ask ourselves: when I wake up on November 4th, will I have done everything in my power to win this election? If the answer is no, right now is the time to start.

name: Mark Warner HQ
subject: The Supreme Court is on the line.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
Make no mistake: the Supreme Court is on the ballot on November 3rd.
|
---

| | Derek --

There's more at stake in this election than just who we're sending to Washington to represent us.

President Trump just released a list of folks he'd like to appoint to the Supreme Court -- a bevy of conservatives who have all publicly said they support rolling back _Roe v. Wade._ Allowing Donald Trump to have control of the Supreme Court would chip away at reproductive freedom. Americans deserve a court that will vote fairly on the issues that impact our communities -- not one that's been weaponized.

**Make no mistake: The Supreme Court is on the ballot on November 3rd.**

The progress we've made in this country was hard-won, and we can't afford to give Trump another four years in office to continue to undo the strides we've made. It's absolutely critical that we turn the tide.

[**We need to re-elect folks like Mark Warner and elect Democrats up and down the ballot to protect the progress we 've made. Can you chip in and help us?**](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85dacb/53d9897e/55f06733/1c880a92/1754060906/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6Ijc3OCJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-scotus?refcode=20200914_f_1_nd__778__&refcode2=ask1&amount=5")

Mark is committed to protecting the right of every American to make deeply personal choices about reproductive health for themselves -- that's why he voted against anti-choice bills in the Senate earlier this year. Mark will always protect reproductive rights and defend against any attacks to chip away at those rights.

We have a real path toward a change in Washington this year. We can flip the Senate blue and replace Donald Trump and Mike Pence with Joe Biden and Kamala Harris. But to make that a reality, we're going to need everyone to vote -- [**and we 're going to need to hold seats like Mark's.**](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85dacb/53d9897e/55f06733/1c880a91/1754060906/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6Ijc3OCJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-scotus?refcode=20200914_f_1_nd__778__&refcode2=ask2&amount=5")

Thanks for your continued support.

-- Team Warner

| [CONTRIBUTE](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85dacb/53d9897e/55f06733/1c880a90/1754060906/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6Ijc3OCJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-scotus?refcode=20200914_f_1_nd__778__&refcode2=cont&amount=5")
---

|

1490-5A Quarterpath Road #213
Williamsburg, VA 23185

**We can’t believe it, but there are only 50 days left until Election Day 2020. **

There are going to be a lot of late nights and early mornings (and a lot of coffee) for our team over the final sprint to November 3rd, but friend —**when Nancy wins on November 3rd it'll be worth it. **

_We’re giving 110% from today until Election Day, but we can’t do this alone. We need every single conservative in the Lowcountry to stand up and say _enough is enough.__

| Derek,
Come and join the Trump Victory Team **this Tuesday** in Littleton and Colebrook for lunch and dinner events this Tuesday! The events will feature Trump Campaign Senior Advisor John Pence, Republican nominee for U.S. Senate Corky Messner, and Republican nominee for New Hampshire’s Second Congressional District Steve Negron. Bumper stickers, pins, rally signs, and other Trump swag will be available for attendees! Both of these stops are listed below. Come join us! Our first stop will be at the **Schilling Beer Co.** in **Littleton**. This will take place from **2:00 PM-3:30 PM** and is located at 18 Mill Street, Littleton, NH 03561. For further information and to RSVP, please use the link below. [RSVP HERE](https://click.mlsend.com/link/c/YT0xNTEwMjIyMjE5Mzg3NjA2NjMwJmM9YjFxMCZlPTE5MjgmYj00MDg2MjcyNzUmZD1iMWw5bjh6._EfkoixiEYZiefc1JhE96Fr2zz7Eh4xSFE3ApTKd4T0) Our Second stop will be at the **Black Bear Tavern** in **Colebrook**. This will take place from **5:00 PM-7:00 PM** and is located at 151 Main Street, Colebrook, NH 03576. Food and drinks will be provided compliments of the campaign. For further information and to RSVP, please use the link below. [RSVP HERE](https://click.mlsend.com/link/c/YT0xNTEwMjIyMjE5Mzg3NjA2NjMwJmM9YjFxMCZlPTE5MjgmYj00MDg2MjcyNzgmZD1tNG02djB5.Brg-0qvroygNsJpbvt56mu5GaezZLxYLKT5WK1Xfz1k) Let’s Keep America Great, New Hampshire Trump Victory

name: Sri, me (2)
subject: grateful
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sri for Congress
body:
together, we can do this
Friend,
I’m thankful to have you in the fight for real leadership in our district -- **and I’m grateful that, for the next few hours, a group of generous donors have agreed to match whatever donations we receive from supporters like you.**
