Friend,

Our big win last week gave us a HUGE surge of momentum. But the countdown to the general election has already started, and we can’t afford to take our foot off the gas for a single second.

Chris Pappas is well-funded (thanks to Nancy Pelosi) and well-connected. He’s got Washington elites campaigning for him and they have already spent a ton of money - we’re talking MILLIONS of dollars - on TV ads ahead of Election Day.

_To keep up, we’ll need as much grassroots support as possible._

**That’s why we are launching a mid-month Money Bomb and it starts right now.**
[ ](http://links.mowersforcongress.com/u/click?_t=40916cb2eb47469286d89e7d5b57adeb&_m=3da5a0545dc64a55829631b9eb24213f&_e=4wD29RgHT2B-lV5VwoLt5wi1hZpGCvmAJY4PEq4OfRR82NL5y5D0qdSSGca2ydgEoHRZ3QUmTjjppNGWtrg7PB5--wp2H3v-0rPNGBlRR_zAcGiO0r2xLEDqkkJfKefBHIe9I7EGbdrXLOhKFBpf0SUdhy6Zd7yVKToU982pSCV29NvLrEu-Ik3CBC8gLvnOw2VV_rlCeQahotUyZRP7tFbynCl5sPyeKX6I_qDt7lIEsr_D68RBeJFndoVprioxj0t_0Y9JZT91YqrXv3AwfGrq-H997pd6sZqSRXDS_d6pXpocYemNtBFkBcUtZ2lwlEwb5WUBElZjKkJFyM38ocyZqhcQA2W5848JPHHRlPk__TruEeSbpIXiddzMLKnI_8NQiHzA2w6tQ5x7RfiQBKFcVp_fQ308aUYBbZN7lcqVjE8kcaG20wkzS-kZMXI_9L6A6UCTUPkWDpKg0GBk1CRg4KApTHAeF83kjZ0dmAHit-PPdGAhZfukyU6DSuUA)
Joining is simple - just chip in $5 today and pledge to chip in another $5 at the end of the month.

By joining the Money Bomb, your support is going twice as far. That means Team Mowers can keep twice as many ads running, put up twice as many yard signs, knock on twice as many doors, and buy twice as many pizzas for the hungry volunteers who keep our campaign going.

**When every single cent goes to getting Mowers elected, twice as much makes a HUGE difference.**

_So what do you say, friend - will you join our Money Bomb?_

subject: NH races to watch -- who supports an income tax?

body:
| |

---
| Friends, Now that the Primaries are over and we know who the nominees are, it is critical that we make sure we are electing Senators that will never support an income or a sales tax! **Below, find some of the top contested races in NH and where each candidate stands on the issue of taxes:**
---
---
| |
---
|
---
| |
---
| District 1
---

---
| |
---
Erin Hennessey (R-Littleton)
Proven tax fighter. Will never support an income, sales tax or capital gains tax.
---
Susan Ford (D-Easton)
Voted for an Income Tax in SB-1 and HB-712. Voted for a Capital Gains Tax in HB-686.
---
| |
---
| | [Donate $5 to Erin Hennessey!](https://click.ml.mailersend.com/link/c/YT0xNTEwMjYxNDY4MDczODI1MzU0JmM9YTRmMyZlPTE5MjgmYj00MDg2ODg2MTYmZD1vNHg2cDZl.ACBpMaRCanUfqLOoPkMzArgJs6QaKZLuU_z9F9hs6Aw)
---
---
| |
---
|
---
| |
---
| District 12
---

---
| |
---
Kevin Avard (R-Nashua)
Proven tax fighter. Will never support an income, sales tax or capital gains tax.
---
Melanie Levesque (D- Brookline)
Voted for an Income Tax in SB-1 and HB-712.
---

Friend,

As our opponent and national special interests gear up to launch attacks against us, I know that our grassroots campaign has what it takes to stand strong and fight back.

Our campaign is built from the ground up: we don’t have big money, corporate PACs running offense for us. Instead, we believe that running a campaign by the people, for the people, built on the issues that matter most to Floridians is how we win.

**Thanks to supporters like you who have powered our campaign so far, we have launched our first TV ad, we are running digital ads and sending out mail to voters to ensure they hear our message before their mail ballots arrive. But now, I’m counting on you to help us continue these important voter outreach efforts.**

**[We have set a $50,000 goal by the end of the month to ensure we have the resources we need to effectively run our campaign. name: Lisa Scheller
subject: GRASSROOTS UPDATE: 9/14
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lisa Scheller for Congress, Inc
body:
**Team Scheller Victory Grassroots Update**
**September 14th** **Last Weeks Update:** The Scheller campaign was excited to welcome 23 new volunteers to the team! These hard-working volunteers knocked on over 4,000 doors and made over 7,000 phone calls this week. Keep up the good work Team Scheller! Join the team by signing up [HERE](http://links.schellerforcongress.com/u/click?_t=2618b931a0124f90ba4a51cf9fda2c48&_m=a29feb7eb66943e493ed28ca1c9640df&_e=Pjg9hRUCOzJA1GJYsD54YVfm_43iaRmRCH1XLpzWJguhAZAoeHN_thB3MZksaOzZaprmXbCTUb57KBIBwxJzWWbngQFWtUctQKaHPr-uSL8UkY9hhOKheCBHLIHt9xJDUJEOqcErAu_QBbouB9wysUWtiWy5-utlK5RlfAn90p1YeZ8Gww3VkCsyelr2Yst93v1LfR0n3Kyjs5luA0-sAMhLLG4j7WxPUPGG6qJRd1pn3ej2ebbzi6xfuJcwfis3RxoDutpaUKuDx13yr3WVnjE21YMjRgiI6NbyT75QMHo%3D) This week we had two phone banks and a Super Saturday door-to-door event, they were all very successful with a great response from voters! The tide is turning in the 7th District. Over the weekend Lisa, when she wasn't knocking on doors, took some time to donate desks....Last week, we had a yard sign pick up event at the office where many people came to pick up signs to support Team Scheller! Don't forget to come pick up yours at our office! In addition to that, we had a meet and greet at NJT Arms where people came out to exercise their right to bear arms and protect the Second Amendment. Over the weekend Lisa, when she wasn't knocking on doors, took some time to donate desks, backpacks, and school supplies to local children in Allentown through the Ortiz Ark Foundation and Promise Neighborhood of Lehigh Valley. **This Week Moving Forward:** [2A Rally Tuesday September 15th at 6:30 pm:](http://links.schellerforcongress.com/u/click?_t=2618b931a0124f90ba4a51cf9fda2c48&_m=a29feb7eb66943e493ed28ca1c9640df&_e=Pjg9hRUCOzJA1GJYsD54YXidv3rwx4slMr6wUxnPl4I7kAGpJuMkRQVpvWpJ0qGMYEwJn81lGmFdMnys_eqvLLGpGspfCnxIshP1lXqb6JvPw8ye6JpSLt1praBgpL0pLkW3H8Q5PdKsMIVUB11xFv5D_arOPwI8hwZJF6rbkeOffeYZBNL_IhmDIMFKFmKuMHYBEzrPUudiCC1Gynmev0s2we8DBWQB6nhoxcagHu73-v3_ThdS3DEYbWXDW1KMVfoWOx-FokX6qv97uU9SzaN17Y5Bh1DoePZEoBbEWmJfk7jlmsYm27NbyVIWZl4HDIesMGpsW_64sHwt5dDPJtbAFnc35s8QId7CLmf2QKn2QebK4KBSE1ojScsotLva) [Phone bank on Friday at 5:30 pm:](http://links.schellerforcongress.com/u/click?_t=2618b931a0124f90ba4a51cf9fda2c48&_m=a29feb7eb66943e493ed28ca1c9640df&_e=Pjg9hRUCOzJA1GJYsD54YXidv3rwx4slMr6wUxnPl4JBpXL1Yd_t-lXd9zOJOr_zDwhIv_CSAGSajmGE_sj0WtUZpJZgu5hIZZ0h5kS4kB5346xCkbMKUvMoQ1SRMOzCMSHQS0U4MPPUcqtLVEPpClwVf5Ic0V6tB7863m9IzQF6sY3z1Bw0Ko4NErzNWbCh13lDmfkvOg5zTyj4sJXWxOMvUbAf2di7gU2sTCzndz5xWCMQ6BWbNw1vzRjnX4hp1HpqMjEfQxarZ5_Ys4JXXSt8s7rqBouuy6Ysqa5b3iBXfiZK9eIdaRXKLEYmeMHB)
[Door knocking on Saturday at 10 am:](http://links.schellerforcongress.com/u/click?_t=2618b931a0124f90ba4a51cf9fda2c48&_m=a29feb7eb66943e493ed28ca1c9640df&_e=Pjg9hRUCOzJA1GJYsD54YXidv3rwx4slMr6wUxnPl4K82NMbZ62ibqSxPefLYadJb3lIg9VSZp1uX1BchO8XvR0f9cY1ORA1SrGVIJScLP91S6XNqtyy2XinUTlJ-B4-KKDS8rTZObOA1quPadKVWf8kMwErQ3A-OcJDuFwTX5RPDNIyQQHVyS6ewPuXgb_4pWF8DEmWY_z5ADzyFeVAGpGV2kunEMrJREno1V2lGcFMgl00hTWfaCqJoedH_ARTLYryNc_u7HaS0oRHbKLL2PXSfbiZ-xCanv8IU4ZNT0E6-tkh7mLr4Aeqd0bjpUJR) [Door knocking on Sunday at 2 pm:](http://links.schellerforcongress.com/u/click?_t=2618b931a0124f90ba4a51cf9fda2c48&_m=a29feb7eb66943e493ed28ca1c9640df&_e=Pjg9hRUCOzJA1GJYsD54YXidv3rwx4slMr6wUxnPl4K82NMbZ62ibqSxPefLYadJ7at2x_BQUAKjmUH4NJpBSXdpvcs31vtaGioNl0mr1V1oyzgCkRdJ9XGeRw2U71_kLuXYOFbywlm-mOtZhc1Fz6_LAzyTo2vb6rBUCEiZ5CyFzMzOPKT8fB1pgGHKWIVVOv7lAywqxEIVFAKzT39JJWyyPCIoMAbKW1kITtvyJMuSLhwZ-vFxYtwq4Y7oxZ-AYvqdug0BZnrNEnQbJXBP9FnJafEPQahA58CBQJrsl7J_WPjPDSih0peCbBUZOaVIQSnn0DzENVBygD5kDOCryg%3D%3D) **Volunteer of the Week** **Peter Hrycenko, Allentown PA.** Peter is a volunteer from Allentown and is a retired civil servant. He spends every weekend knocking on doors and staffing events for Team Scheller! Here is what Peter has to say: "I just had to get involved. Question was, who to volunteer for. When Lisa Scheller got the endorsement of President Trump, I looked close. She is the fighter we need to help take back the US House of Representatives.
While in the US Army, I had once traveled throughout eastern Europe and the Soviet Union and saw the gray ugliness of totalitarianism. Lisa Scheller might have taken an easier path in life, than to stand up for us against career swamp dwellers. Yesterday, at a meet-and-greet when I heard nationally known conservative Rabbi Aryeh Spero eloquently describe how conservative fighters can turn the tide, I was convinced Lisa Scheller will be surrounded by the best men and women here and in Washington DC."
Great work, Peter! Thank you for your support. Hope you had a great weekend, Have a great Monday! -Team Scheller Paid for by Lisa Scheller for Congress, Inc. [Unsubscribe](http://links.schellerforcongress.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=2618b931a0124f90ba4a51cf9fda2c48&_s=a29feb7eb66943e493ed28ca1c9640df&_t=tT26tV6XgJG9wQDr_evlDPwkSqWT7U7ZH2YvHWbDjr11Tg-DFvGbMe9A0-st7iVyg7PS2k9rbJclqK9unREavhvfdrSD5DDYZQpQPeb3APbVbewCZBgaZHFJGEwttSSCUkvHF__j9jfKKO4bvTrp6NffIggi8OFlNpvz3QGCXvw%3D)

name: URGENT via Jon Ossoff HQ
subject: time is running out ⏳
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JON OSSOFF FOR SENATE
body:
We don't have a moment to spare. |
---
Time is running out, friend.

We are almost halfway through September, and we are falling behind on our fundraising goal for the month!

This can't happen -- not when Mitch McConnell and his allies are spending **$35 MILLION** to stop Jon Ossoff.

**[Chip in $20 RIGHT NOW to help us get back on track>>](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e298d/5b2c1286/39956cf3/25f37d8b/200041618/VEsH/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_09_14_behind_mm?refcode=em_2020_09_14_behind_mm&amount=20")**
| | [DONATE $20!](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e298d/5b2c1286/39956cf3/25f37d8b/200041618/VEsE/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_09_14_behind_mm?refcode=em_2020_09_14_behind_mm&amount=20")
---

name: Gina Raimondo
subject: First day
body:
Today was a big day in Rhode Island – students and teachers headed back to school!
---
| | | | | |
---
| Hello friend,
Today was a big day in Rhode Island - students and teachers headed back to school! I know the first day looked different this year than it has in years past, and I know today may have been accompanied by first day jitters. I want you to know that these jitters are normal. I also want you to know that we're ready and have plans in place to make this year successful.
As I've said from the very beginning: we owe it to our kids to get them safely back into the classroom. Today, the months of hard work paid off.
I am so proud of the work that went into safely reopening our schools. Our teams at the state and local levels have spent all summer preparing for today, and for the year ahead.
---
|
---
| This morning I stopped by McGuire Elementary in North Providence and Veazie Street Elementary in Providence to help welcome students back to school and see firsthand how things were going. Students, teachers and administrators were excited to be back. And they were following the safety protocols and setting an example for the rest of the school year.
We also saw an outpouring of support on social media today from parents and teachers across the state who were excited to get back to school -- you can see for yourself if you check out [#Back2SchoolRI](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001LpyTSaEdR5KUwFmwb6OOgY5cYiN14fU91BaDgzHRySogpfJ_kgcZowgx22bQBB8GT10mxuzhHMaz0JCLKlfTlzq_xvrGTmSz6HTs9t3EEwWGnwY5vrVYyKK2dDKmeRuKp9_b_gGRXs1MTvDyzHkd1vXxMyVzfDXNmfCeApNsDuQ=&c=kQR1RMws5M2b7lwQP2xXe_kOxxMMQvVvMUhZa9gMU34E8FXCI_108A==&ch=xZ47cMu2RyRvJEUIjNSsXtJSdWtS826LkdvvX4Dl9Mi3NIiv57UDUg==).
We're all in this together,
-Gina Raimondo Governor

Peter,
There is a disturbing trend in American politics over the last few months — violence and hatred directed at police officers across the country. Sadly, two police officers were just attacked in LA, and mob protesters blocked their ambulances while chanting, “We hope they die!”

How did we get here? The truth is that in order to score political points, the Left has chosen to inflame tensions against the police. I’m proud to have the support of police officers in my campaign, including the Albuquerque Police Officers Association. [_Check out my latest video addressing this issue_](https://u14066317.ct.sendgrid.net/ls/click?upn=xDqpR0G3DjuYE5JnpHlAmZTdBrgFC3xZepXQi3pi5WBIP0lBK7vph8muRdeP06RjWFwFyfAt4C7sHtrISUYW40qU6E9d8qEMNmqAtfVMbEA-3DULp5_XwU9lPq5-2Bze3gI64ohlV0cQwWAuBAU7ADIvj2CS7ymhuTI2jG3IYR5NWbV52qgmdAiGhBklNQsRXTWl4rWtz6V26ifmsOhc2lTNkdXy-2F5FFomLfxGZOGa3bZcww1pfz6kuRVaQKTvSh5M3PsTvqIW3dmIlBIw-2FsDsPxw10m7eyGrD8ombHEy14T1hSj9RkY88bk2SDU8BnQkgyizreZpXA3Ok2U0DIpa-2FR6eaBuhi4e8tXUd9-2FEtC-2BLA0aEu3-2FS6gS0DblQR9ZkHvzbADP-2FjeCrXe6rKsPGMgYZunAzASBMk7AjsvrKEDC7Z02gwglHOyeQYzzimOzctY8GtVbwMy3TghwfXAQtDDygjyAwxLbjFnnXOSN6FVhMyrdc-2B9d-2BmWa-2BH8xRyfl-2BW8OjmEduysskv4Anb4DyrshIwx4dGKp6xcpp8PeZErH-2FzpjqQ4CxX5qF1Imt7En5RbIu74lXL08reMhDN7FtdJJ4ZHUtv-2Bj5FfNltNxvCDr1G0iKVPr7scZQqNZmMjgBddbXiEyTOb0ApOIu6QlzluzbS-2BJh9jvHsUNc7J5bRnFjRCzI301z83l78907BZmCyB5d-2FXRLvtYi-2Fz0kynmDaX4tFdbXipA6TnJhkPv-2B4CEmhGLlDFQaIfVD1J8WweGoLgd640FCpa-2BhdgTPon8eRqpGhMenpyeS6qoASQiSfUYorYmshbyBtMuir9AugH-2BSyXHvLJHynbpi4qKAxYXkHPO-2BXaqREEYfXqLvBcgSbnU5yy4YVQ3xG70ukEPS7KEqmiM-2BQbxQjS0SpO4y-2BsKFhnxpS3Zc-2FMQtfihKZ-2BRD3o9ypaNN3qsiZru10SQ-2F23X8fYNnT3Ncq0CoMRvwK4S8H4syhmWS-2FyNBN3oKaMXb6YKQGnNgr5OFCPyYCxGeXBE-2BtO8mDe-2FDNteN1sRPlW-2BFWnps8RCZGCsI4UKN7hkyH9Zpw-2FClcXyqCtKoXMfRu7B2-2BrKgbo3vZ2Q-3D-3D):

We need leaders who will put the needs of New Mexicans ahead of their own partisan ideology. Just like when Ben Ray Lujan voted to release violent criminals from prison, including rapists and murderers. Or when Luján refused to support efforts by the federal government to fight violent crime in Albuquerque because he didn’t want to give President Trump credit for tackling the issue. Recent calls by liberal politicians to “Defund the Police” are misguided and will only make our crime problem worse. Sadly, it’s the people of New Mexico who will pay the price.

clean_body: | | | | Peter, There is a disturbing trend in American politics over the last few months — violence and hatred directed at police officers across the country. Sadly, two police officers were just attacked in LA, and mob protesters blocked their ambulances while chanting, “We hope they die!” How did we get here? The truth is that in order to score political points, the Left has chosen to inflame tensions against the police. I’m proud to have the support of police officers in my campaign, including the Albuquerque Police Officers Association. : | | | We need leaders who will put the needs of New Mexicans ahead of their own partisan ideology. Just like when Ben Ray Lujan voted to release violent criminals from prison, including rapists and murderers. Or when Luján refused to support efforts by the federal government to fight violent crime in Albuquerque because he didn’t want to give President Trump credit for tackling the issue. Recent calls by liberal politicians to “Defund the Police” are misguided and will only make our crime problem worse. Sadly, it’s the people of New Mexico who will pay the price. If you want to hear more about my thoughts on this issue as it relates to the push to defund the police in Albuquerque, Please consider sharing the video so we can continue to expand our reach. Thank you so much for your continued support Mark P.S. Not all of our supporters are able to donate to our campaign, and for those who can donate, we are very grateful. | "Facebook" | "Twitter" | "Instagram" ---|---|--- PAID FOR BY MARK RONCHETTI FOR NEW MEXICO ==

Kara Eastman is running to flip Nebraska's second district from red to blue. She has dedicated her entire career to bettering her community through nonprofits and social work. She was inspired to run for office after her mom got cancer for the 5th time, and was prescribed a pill that cost $2500. Kara's mom chose to keep her house, and lost her battle with cancer after losing her life-savings to cancer drugs. As Kara watched her Republican Representative Don Bacon vote to repeal the Affordable Care Act and rob millions of their access to health care, she knew she couldn't sit on the sidelines.

If you want to support Kara's campaign for Congress, [_**please rush in a donation here. >>**_](https://act.eastmanforcongress.com/page/m/17c6e846/77d4c309/21bdb91d/2635fcc5/2166314818/VEsHAg/?g=SoBiD8btZKdfO2weHdUSFCA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/eastmanforcongress-em?refcode=em_footer&amount=25")

Another thing -- we know we send a lot of fundraising emails. It's because Kara has pledged not to take a cent of corporate PAC money. Unlike her Republican opponent, she relies on this grassroots community to fund her campaign. If you'd like to receive fewer emails from Kara, [_**please click here.**_](https://act.eastmanforcongress.com/page/m/17c6e846/77d4c309/21bdb91d/2635fcc4/2166314818/VEsHDQ/?g=SoBiD8btZKdfO2weHdUSFCA "https://act.eastmanforcongress.com/page/s/receive-fewer-emails") We'd hate to lose you completely, but if you'd like to unsubscribe, [_please click here._](https://act.eastmanforcongress.com/page/m/17c6e846/77d4c309/21bdb91d/2635fcc7/2166314818/VEsHDA/?g=SoBiD8btZKdfO2weHdUSFCA "https://act.eastmanforcongress.com/page/content/unsub-footer/")

We can't tell you how much Kara appreciates your grassroots support!

7117 Farnam St, Ste. 2, Omaha, NE 68132
info@eastmanforcongress.com

She has dedicated her entire career to bettering her community through nonprofits and social work. She was inspired to run for office after her mom got cancer for the 5th time, and was prescribed a pill that cost $2500. Kara's mom chose to keep her house, and lost her battle with cancer after losing her life-savings to cancer drugs. As Kara watched her Republican Representative Don Bacon vote to repeal the Affordable Care Act and rob millions of their access to health care, she knew she couldn't sit on the sidelines. If you want to support Kara's campaign for Congress, "" Another thing -- we know we send a lot of fundraising emails. It's because Kara has pledged not to take a cent of corporate PAC money. Unlike her Republican opponent, she relies on this grassroots community to fund her campaign. If you'd like to receive fewer emails from Kara, "" We'd hate to lose you completely, but if you'd like to unsubscribe, "" We can't tell you how much Kara appreciates your grassroots support! 7117 Farnam St, Ste. 2, Omaha, NE 68132 info@eastmanforcongress.com | | Paid for by Eastman for Congress

name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: Can you contribute to these 5 pro-choice Democratic women running for Senate?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren Democrats
body:
This year, we need to flip four more to win the majority, and EMILY's List has endorsed five women who are ready to get the job done: Sara Gideon in Maine, Theresa Greenfield in Iowa, MJ Hegar in Texa | | | [](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28525194/45c30650/1c08614e9/66e8ca2c/2435031674/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://elizabethwarren.com?source=em-header&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")
---
Defunding Planned Parenthood, stacking the courts with right-wing ideologues, repealing health care -- these are a few of Mitch McConnell's favorite things.

And they're at the top of his wish list for 2021 if he gets to stay on as Senate Majority Leader.

So Democrats need to take back the Senate this November.

In 2018, EMILY's List -- a terrific organization that helps elect pro-choice Democratic women -- helped flip two Republican-held Senate seats.

This year, we need to flip four more to win the majority, and EMILY's List has endorsed five women who are ready to get the job done: Sara Gideon in Maine, Theresa Greenfield in Iowa, MJ Hegar in Texas, Barbara Bollier in Kansas, and Paulette Jordan in Idaho.

**[To help make it happen, EMILY's List has set a goal of raising $125,000 by midnight tonight. If you're able to, please pitch in-- 100% of your contribution will go directly to these candidates' Senate campaigns.](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28525194/45c30650/1c08614e9/66e8ca2f/2435031674/VEsE/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://emilyslist.org/bundle/blue-senate-in-2020?source=warren1")**

Now, I'd like to second to talk about why your donation would go an especially long way right now.

This year, a lot more people will be voting early. So a lot of the big "get out the vote" outreach that usually happens in the last stretch of an election cycle is happening right now. Every day, campaigns need to be out there finding new ways to talk with voters and make sure everyone is ready to cast their ballots.

That type of grassroots organizing works -- but it takes a lot of resources.

So EMILY's List is doing their part to give these pro-choice Democratic women's Senate campaigns a big boost at this pivotal moment.

And if you can, I'm asking you to get in the fight by their side.

**[If you're in a place to make a financial contribution right now, will you pitch in $2 or whatever makes sense for you? Help hit this goal with EMILY's List by midnight, and help take back the Senate with pro-choice Democratic women.](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28525194/45c30650/1c08614e9/66e8ca2f/2435031674/VEsF/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://emilyslist.org/bundle/blue-senate-in-2020?source=warren1")**

Thanks for being a part of this,

Elizabeth

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: WATCH: President Trump awards Distinguished Flying Cross to 7 California National Guardsmen
body:
President Trump just honored seven members of California’s National Guard with the Distinguished Flying Cross... | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=fc6a715467&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| The White House • September 14, 2020
---
| | |
# **WATCH: President Trump awards Distinguished Flying Cross to 7 California National Guardsmen**

**President Trump just honored** seven members of California’s National Guard with the Distinguished Flying Cross, a military decoration that recognizes heroism and extraordinary achievement.

**“Just over one week ago,** these brave pilots and crew members of the California Army National Guard embarked on a harrowing mission,” the President said this afternoon from McClellan Park, California. On the night of September 5 and into the morning of September 6, the National Guardsmen flew two helicopters to Mammoth Pool campground, where families had become stranded and surrounded by fire.

**Despite limited visibility** amid the heavy smoke, these men completed their mission over the course of 10 harrowing hours—returning three times to the campground and saving the lives of 242 people.

**“Our Nation is strong** because of remarkable individuals like these service members,” President Trump said. “In the midst of our greatest trials and biggest challenges, America prevails because of the brave and selfless patriots who risk everything.”

**President Trump** traveled to California today to meet with state officials and receive a briefing on the devastating wildfires. He approved a Major Disaster Declaration for the state in August, and his Administration continues to provide support for state and local officials via numerous Fire Management Assistance Grants and other forms of aid.

**“We want** **to thank** these incredible people—the first responders, service members”—who save lives while racing into “extreme peril,” President Trump said.

**🎬**[Watch President Trump tell the incredible story of these heroes](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=b7ca389ed7&e=3ee4985eea)

**🎬**[California Governor thanks President for fast response to wildfires](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=fc2ecd6f74&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
|
## **First Lady holds roundtable on Sickle Cell Disease**

**First Lady Melania Trump** led a roundtable discussion on Sickle Cell Disease (SCD) at the White House today. The disease affects about 100,000 Americans in total and occurs in roughly 1 out of every 365 African-American births.

**“We are surrounded today** by doctors, researchers, advocates, parents, and patients–all united by our belief that a better and healthier future for our children is within our reach,” the First Lady said.

**For the first time** since the Reagan Administration in 1983, an American President delivered SCD messages to the Nation when President Trump did so in 2018 and 2019.

**In fact, the Trump Administration** has done more than any administration in history for people living with the disease, including signing the Sickle Cell Disease and Other Heritable Blood Disorders Research, Surveillance, Prevention, and Treatment Act of 2018.

**“At the direction of the President,** we have made huge changes to empower minority communities in many different ways like by improving infrastructure, creating better economic and workforce opportunities, and addressing health disparities in America,” said Ja’Ron Smith, Deputy Assistant to the President for Domestic Policy.

**One participant** in today’s event, 12-year-old Samuel Price, described having SCD as like feeling the scratch of nails on a blackboard—except feeling it “on the inside of you.”

**Under President Trump,** the National Institutes of Health has launched the “Cure Sickle Cell Initiative” to accelerate new genetic therapies, while the FDA has announced accelerated approval for two effective therapies.

**🎬** [Watch: First Lady holds roundtable on Sickle Cell Disease](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=7f0f253e90&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
|
## Photo of the Day
---
|
---
| **President Trump presents the Medal of Honor to U.S. Army Sgt. Maj. Thomas Patrick Payne** | September 11, 2020
---
|

---

name: =?utf-8?Q?Dani=20Brzozowski?=
subject: The West is on Fire. Where's Kinzinger?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dani for Illinois
body:
5 Million acres turned to ash | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/6db7febd5c39/help-me-cut-through-the-noise-nonsense-around-voting-3911646?e=140a9b81e7)
---
| |
---
| |
#
5 Million acres turned to ash

24 people dead

Unbreathable air

**This was avoidable. **

Thoughts and prayers won’t cut it. Blame game and scapegoating won’t, either. Every single one of us has a responsibility to take swift action to combat the climate crisis.

As Representative of IL-16, I vow to be a champion for being fossil-fuel free by 2050, for recommitting to the Paris Climate Accord, and for holding corporations accountable for their emissions.

**This isn’t a strictly coastal problem.** We need action on climate change now, and we need people in Congress who will fight for that action.

Adam Kinzinger’s record on issues pertaining to the climate crisis and environmental justice includes votes against funding for the EPA, against consumer protections from known pollutants, against protections for federal lands, and against resources for farmers as flooding continues and sustainable agricultural practices remain costly. **Critically, Kinzinger has also voted for permitting corporations to define “clean air.”** His score with the League of Conservation Voters is 7/100.

I’m endorsed by Sierra Club and local Sunrise Movement and have been an environmental activist for decades.

We don’t need just anyone to replace Kinzinger. We need me.

[Can you chip in right now to help elect an environmental champion to Congress?](https://daniforillinois.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=16d8d19eb3a417b5b09061c0d&id=9acc4352f0&e=140a9b81e7)

Dani Brzozowski
Democratic Nominee for Congress, IL-16

name: Team Maggie
subject: Flip the Senate with Democratic Women >>
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
[](https://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc532/2a380d31/2305f0dc/f0bf22/3501294922/VEsH/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "http://www.maggiehassan.com/")
[](https://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc532/2a380d31/2305f0dc/f0bf22/3501294922/VEsE/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "http://www.maggiehassan.com/")
Back in 2016, we flipped New Hampshire's Senate seat to Democratic control and elected Maggie Hassan by just 1,017 votes.
This year, we have a real chance to elect even more Democratic women: Sara Gideon in Maine, Theresa Greenfield in Iowa, Barbara Bollier in Kansas, MJ Hegar in Texas, and Paulette Jordan in Idaho.
[**With just 50 days until Election Day and Mitch McConnell doing everything he can to stop pro-choice, Democratic women from gaining ground, will you please split $3 or more between these campaigns to help them flip the Senate?**](https://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc532/2a380d31/2305f0dc/f0bf23/3501294922/VEsF/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "https://emilyslist.org/bundle/blue-senate-in-2020?source=hassan")
Democrats need to flip four seats to take back the Senate, and these women are facing Republicans with pretty appalling records.
Sara Gideon is running against Susan Collins who cast the deciding vote to put Brett Kavanaugh on the Supreme Court.
Paulette Jordan's opponent votes with Trump more than 90% of the time.
Theresa Greenfield is taking on a staunch anti-choice activists.
And, Barbara Bollier is sure to face a far-right extremist committed to overturning the Affordable Care Act.
**Democrats -- and these women in particular -- can flip the Senate, but only with your help. [You've got a track record of helping elect Democratic women in tough races (after all, this team elected Maggie!) so please rush $3 or more to power these women to victory and take back a Democratic majority.](https://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc532/2a380d31/2305f0dc/f0bf23/3501294922/VEsC/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "https://emilyslist.org/bundle/blue-senate-in-2020?source=hassan")**
Thank you for helping!
Team Maggie
[Contribute](https://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc532/2a380d31/2305f0dc/f0bf23/3501294922/VEsD/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "https://emilyslist.org/bundle/blue-senate-in-2020?source=hassan")

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
To unsubscribe from the Maggie for NH email list, please click here: [Unsubscribe](https://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc532/2a380d31/2305f0dc/f0bf2c/3501294922/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "http://act.maggiehassan.com/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com")
